title: The Web Tightens
description: Signature: all accumulated intelligence and contacts activate simultaneously.

title: The Invisible Hand
description: Capstone: absolute intelligence dominance; the Daimyo moves all pieces without being seen.

title: Basic Attack (Voice of Debt)
description: Free obligation-weighted strike. Once per turn.

title: Oath Read
description: Know obligations within 30 feet; learn HP tier and status of one target; apply Debt 2.

title: Weight of Obligation
description: Deal 5 + VEIL damage; apply Debt 2; deal +VEIL bonus if target carries Debt.

title: Ledger Entry
description: Apply Debt 3 to one target within 40 feet; costs 0 AP if you played Social or Signal card this turn.

title: Oath-Breaker's Weight
description: Deal 4 + VEIL damage to target with 1+ Debt; apply Stagger; apply Debt 2 more.

title: Compound Interest
description: Deal 8 + VEIL damage; apply Debt 3. If target reaches 4+ Debt also apply Expose 2.

title: First Detonation
description: Target with Debt stacks: deal 6 + VEIL plus 3 per Debt stack damage; remove all Debt; apply Stagger.

title: Full Detonation
description: Target with Debt: deal 10 + VEIL plus 5 per Debt stack; remove all Debt; apply Expose 4 and Vulnerable 3.

title: Chain Detonation
description: Primary target: 12 + VEIL plus 5 per stack; remove Debt. Others within 20 feet: 6 + VEIL plus 2 per their own Debt.

title: The Debt of All Things
description: Capstone: apply Debt 5 to all without Debt; then Detonate all: 14 + VEIL plus 6 per stack; Expose 6 + Vulnerable 5.

title: Basic Attack (Merchant Knife)
description: Free trade-weighted strike. Once per turn.

title: Market Read
description: Assess economic and tactical position of target; gain intelligence advantage.

title: Leverage Play
description: Apply economic or social leverage to restrict target's options.

title: Supply Cut
description: Cut target's access to resources or support; apply escalating debuff.

title: Gilded Blade
description: Strike enhanced by economic intelligence; damage scales with advantage accumulated.

title: Network Play
description: Activate trade or intelligence network for significant tactical advantage.

title: The Contract
description: Signature: establish binding economic contract with absolute terms.

title: The Invisible Hand
description: Capstone: the merchant moves all markets and combats without apparent presence.

title: Basic Attack (Iron Herald)
description: Free herald-authority strike. Once per turn.

title: Establish Command Zone
description: Establish Command Zone centered on self; enables zone-synergy abilities.

title: Priority Mark
description: Designate Priority Target; allies gain bonuses against marked target.

title: Rally Call
description: Inspire nearby allies; apply minor buff to all within Command Zone.

title: Coordinated Strike
description: Strike in conjunction with ally; damage amplified by coordination.

title: Command Pulse
description: Pulse Command Zone authority outward; apply debuff to all enemies in zone.

title: Zone Dominance
description: Signature: Command Zone achieves absolute tactical dominance.

title: The Banner Falls
description: Capstone: the herald's authority is absolute; none in range can deny the command.

title: Basic Attack (Curse Eater)
description: Free Loaded-state strike. Once per turn.

title: Absorb
description: Absorb one debuff from ally; gain Loaded stack; ally is cleansed.

title: Loaded Strike
description: Strike powered by Loaded stacks; damage scales with current Loaded count.

title: Purge Burst
description: Release Loaded stacks as purifying burst; cleanse multiple targets.

title: Corruption Pulse
description: Release Corruption Points as damaging pulse; area control through accumulated corruption.

title: Loaded Fortress
description: Convert Loaded stacks into significant defensive barrier.

title: The Consumed Form
description: Signature: embrace full corruption; Consumed subclass peak state.

title: Absolute Purge
description: Capstone: absolute purification or absolute corruption; the eater completes their arc.

title: Basic Attack (Shell Dancer)
description: Free evasion-state strike. Once per turn.

title: Controlled Discharge
description: Convert Cascade into offensive output; damage scales with Cascade count.

title: Enter Shell Step
description: Enter Shell Step evasion state; become difficult to target.

title: Cascade Strike
description: Strike that generates Cascade from damage; hit harder as you're hit harder.

title: Evasion Cut
description: Strike executed from Shell Step; high damage enabled by evasion state.

title: Cascade Burst
description: Release all Cascade as concentrated burst; massive damage potential.

title: Shell Step Strike
description: Signature: deliver a strike from absolute Shell Step depth; near-unavoidable.

title: The Broken Perfection
description: Capstone: the dancer becomes perfectly broken; damage and evasion fuse into one.

title: Basic Attack (Fracture Knight)
description: Free between-state strike. Once per turn.

title: Between Strike
description: Strike partially from Between; ignores some physical defenses.

title: Phantom Charge
description: Spend Phantom Charges to perform extraordinary movement.

title: Apply Fracture
description: Apply Fracture stacks to target; accumulates damage scaling.

title: Phantom Strike
description: Strike using Phantom Charge power; damage scales with charge spent.

title: Between Burst
description: Detonate Fracture stacks for massive burst damage.

title: Phantom Army
description: Signature: summon all accumulated Between phantoms as overwhelming force.

title: Between: The Final Blow
description: Capstone: a strike from the deepest Between; the enemy cannot exist in the same space.

title: Card 1 (Unnamed)
description: Player-defined card unlocked by personal condition. Mechanics defined at unlock.

title: Card 2 (Unnamed)
description: Player-defined card unlocked by personal condition. Mechanics defined at unlock.

title: Card 3 (Unnamed)
description: Player-defined card unlocked by personal condition. Mechanics defined at unlock.

title: Card 4 (Unnamed)
description: Player-defined card unlocked by personal condition. Mechanics defined at unlock.

title: Card 5 (Unnamed)
description: Player-defined card unlocked by personal condition. Mechanics defined at unlock.

title: Card 6 (Unnamed)
description: Player-defined card unlocked by personal condition. Mechanics defined at unlock.

title: Card 7 (Unnamed)
description: Player-defined card unlocked by personal condition. Mechanics defined at unlock.

title: Card 8 (Unnamed)
description: Player-defined card unlocked by personal condition. Mechanics defined at unlock.

title: Card 9 (Unnamed)
description: Player-defined card unlocked by personal condition. Mechanics defined at unlock.

title: Card 10 (Unnamed)
description: Player-defined card unlocked by personal condition. Mechanics defined at unlock.

title: Card 11 (Unnamed)
description: Player-defined card unlocked by personal condition. Mechanics defined at unlock.

title: Card 12 (Unnamed)
description: Player-defined card unlocked by personal condition. Mechanics defined at unlock.

title: Card 13 (Unnamed)
description: Player-defined card unlocked by personal condition. Mechanics defined at unlock.

title: Card 14 (Unnamed)
description: Player-defined card unlocked by personal condition. Mechanics defined at unlock.

title: Unmarked Strike
description: Free once-per-turn basic attack scaling with Active Stat. Deals 4 + Active Stat damage. Before any cards are named, this is all The Unnamed can reliably do.

title: Card 15 - Capstone (Unnamed)
description: Player-written capstone card defined entirely at Level 20.

title: Ash Walker
description: Years breathing cinder taught your lungs to laugh at it. Ignore difficult terrain from ash, smoke, or rubble; gain a FRAME save against airborne debuffs.

title: Scavenger's Eye
description: A glance at a downed foe tells you which plate pops loose first. After any enemy falls, mark one piece of their gear as salvageable on an EDGE check.

title: Kicked Dust
description: Boot-heel grinds a plume of ashlands grit into an enemy's faceplate. EDGE strike; the target loses sightlines until their next turn.

title: Ghost Trail
description: Move up to 30 feet without leaving tracks or triggering opportunity attacks. One enemy who prepared an attack against you this round loses the readied action.

title: Hook and Run
description: Snag an enemy's belt, armor lip, or weapon strap as you pass. Shift them one step as you continue your move; they spend AP to chase or let it go.

title: Wind Between Blades
description: Thread the gap two enemies leave between them. Move through a contested space without provoking reactions and make a free Basic Attack against one on exit.

title: Planted Boots
description: Drive your heels into the ash and refuse to move. Until your next turn, forced movement against you fails and allies behind you gain cover.

title: Shoulder the Line
description: Step into the space an ally is about to vacate. Swap positions with an adjacent ally and intercept the next attack aimed at them this round; damage to you is reduced by your FRAME modifier.

title: Hold the Gap
description: Stand in a chokepoint and dare them through. Any enemy that enters your zone this round suffers a FRAME-contested stagger.

title: Rearguard Shout
description: A bark in the old ashlands cadence. Allies within earshot clear one fear or rout effect and gain a reaction this round.

title: Field Rig
description: Kneel over debris and lash it into something that works. Spend a turn crafting a single-use tool (shield, grapnel, smoke cannister) from a nearby wreck.

title: Shared Scrap
description: Toss a jerry-rigged charge to an ally mid-fight. Pass one salvage token or improvised item to any ally in line of sight.

title: Pry the Plate
description: Wrench armor off a stunned or downed foe and strap it on the nearest ally. Target ally gains temporary armor until next round.

title: Ghost Circuit
description: You remember where their power lines run. Target one mechanized enemy; their next augmentation or device-based action misfires.

title: Cinder Dance
description: Your feet find the fight's rhythm; dust rises with you. For the round, every attack you land grants a free 1-square reposition.

title: Junkyard Arsenal
description: You kicked through three wrecks on the way in. Draw two improvised items from ambient salvage and arm yourself or an adjacent ally.

title: Low-Caste, High Ground
description: Choose the terrain they underestimated. Reshape one zone into advantageous ashlands terrain; allies gain cover, enemies lose reactions while inside.

title: Seven Steps, No Scar
description: Seven strikes across seven footprints, none of them holding still. Make up to three Basic Attacks against different targets, moving 10 feet between each; enemies cannot make opportunity attacks against you this turn. Once per long rest.

title: Already Gone
description: When targeted by any attack, declare you were already leaving. Cancel the attack, move up to your full speed, and leave a dust cloud in your origin space (heavy obscurement, 10-foot radius, until end of round). Once per short rest.

title: The Wall Is Us
description: Lock shields and memory with every ally in sight. Until the start of your next turn, damage dealt to any anchored ally within 30 feet is split evenly across all anchored members (up to 4 allies + you). Once per long rest.

title: Last to Leave
description: Bark a withdrawal order that lets everyone else disengage. All allies in range move freely without provoking; you become the only valid target but gain a massive FRAME bonus.

title: Battlefield Forge
description: Drag three wrecks together and weld them working in sixty seconds of held breath. Create a battlefield emplacement (turret, barricade, or charging station) your allies can operate.

title: Their Own Weapons
description: Rip the armaments off a fallen foe and turn them loose at their friends. An ally's next ranged attack this round deals an extra 3d6 damage and ignores resistance. Once per short rest.

title: The Ash Remembers
description: Every low-caste who fell before you rises in the dust at your back. Choose: become untargetable for one round as you fade through the ashlands, or summon the memory of fallen Ashfoot kin as shadow-allies who fight one full round beside you.

title: Crimson Apprenticeship
description: Level-up: your bone-forged weapons remember each wound. Once per combat, when you pay HP for a card, recover half that HP at end of turn.

title: Hammer and Vein
description: Level-up: the anvil beats in time with your pulse. Pay 3 HP to gain +1 AP this turn; cannot be used while below half HP.

title: Quickening Blade
description: A fresh-forged blade still wet with marrow-heat. Pay 3 HP to draw a living weapon for the round; your next attack echoes against a second enemy.

title: Hungry Edge
description: The blade drinks before it strikes. Pay 4 HP; your next melee attack this turn applies Bleed 4 and heals you for the Bleed damage dealt.

title: Splintercast
description: Shatter a living weapon mid-swing. Deal 9 + IRON damage split among up to three enemies; pay 5 HP; apply Bleed 2 to each struck.

title: Reforge on the Anvil
description: Tear a blade apart and rebuild it sharper. Pay 6 HP to refresh one combat card you've played this turn; that card deals +IRON damage next time it resolves this combat.

title: Second Skin
description: Grow a carapace of hardened flesh. Pay 4 HP; apply Guard 6 + IRON; gain Regen 2 while the Guard holds.

title: Shared Mantle
description: Peel off a sheet of your own plating for an ally. Pay 5 HP; target ally gains Guard 5 + IRON and the next melee attacker against them takes 4 resonant damage.

title: Gorget of Grudges
description: Every blow that bites you feeds the plate. Pay 6 HP; until end of round, the first attack that hits you is reduced to half damage and the attacker is hit with Expose 3.

title: Martyr's Lattice
description: Lace your flesh into an ally's wounds. Pay 8 HP; an ally within 15 feet heals 10 + RESONANCE and gains Guard 4 + IRON; you take no healing this turn.

title: Marrow Hound
description: Sculpt a lope-shaped servant from cooling blood. Pay 4 HP; summon a Marrow Hound (1 AP to command; melee attack 5 + RESONANCE). Lasts until end of combat or destroyed.

title: Sanguine Sentry
description: Raise a still, watchful figure from a pool of your own blood. Pay 5 HP; place a Sentry in an adjacent space that grants you Guard 3 while you stand beside it and strikes the first enemy to move past.

title: Vein Puppeteer
description: Twitch the threads of a bleeding foe. Target enemy suffering Bleed loses 1 AP next turn and is pulled 10 feet; pay 4 HP.

title: Gallery of the Fallen
description: Every enemy felled this combat leaves a red impression; you call it back. Pay 7 HP; summon a silent Echo of the last enemy slain (half its HP, uses its basic attack for you) until end of combat.

title: Coronary Forge
description: The heart beats, and iron answers. Pay 12 HP; until end of next turn, every card you play refunds 1 HP per point of damage dealt and applies Bleed 2 on hit.

title: The Seventh Vein
description: Open the last, deepest artery and forge the blade only you can wield. Pay 16 HP; deal 24 + IRON damage to one target; if they survive, apply Bleed 5 and Expose 5 and the blade strikes again for 12 + IRON at end of your next turn.

title: Thousand-Edge Dance
description: Shatter every weapon you've forged this combat into a storm of splinters. Pay 14 HP; deal 8 + IRON damage to each enemy within 15 feet per Weaponsmith card you've played this combat (min 2, max 6 triggers).

title: Cathedral of Bone
description: Erupt a dome of rib and plate over your allies. Pay 18 HP; all allies within 15 feet gain Guard 10 + IRON and immunity to Bleed for 2 rounds; enemies entering the dome take 6 + RESONANCE resonant damage.

title: The Last Plate
description: Shed your final layer of flesh as perfect armor. Pay HP equal to half your current total; you cannot be reduced below 1 HP for 2 rounds and reflect half of all damage taken back to its source.

title: Legion From a Bowl
description: Pour out a year of stored blood and shape an army. Pay 20 HP; summon 3 Marrow Hounds and 1 Sanguine Sentry at your position; they act on your turn and dissolve after 3 rounds.

title: Effigy of the Living
description: Sculpt a replica of an enemy in red wax and set it bleeding. Pay 12 HP; target enemy copies its current Bleed stacks onto itself each round for 3 rounds, and any healing they receive heals you instead.

title: Graft Parry
description: A hand sprouts cartilage plates just in time to catch a blow. Reaction to an incoming melee hit; reduce its damage by 1d6 + FRAME.

title: Bone-Spur Riposte
description: When struck, a spine of bone erupts from the wound and gores the attacker. Reaction to a melee hit: deal 1d6 + FRAME piercing damage back to the attacker.

title: Living Chassis
description: Your body perpetually rewrites itself. While any configuration is active, you regenerate minor wounds each round.

title: Second Skin
description: Peel a layer of dead chrome-flesh and harden what remains. Shed a condition or debuff; suffer a minor wound in exchange.

title: Dual Configuration
description: Your chassis learns to hold two shapes at once. Maintain two Configurations simultaneously instead of one.

title: Rapid Reshape
description: Muscle memory overtakes bone memory. Reconfigure as a reaction once per combat instead of an action.

title: Adaptive Plating
description: The plates on your skin shift with each incoming blow, matching the strike type. Gain resistance to the last damage type that hit you until the end of your next turn.

title: Gut Bastion
description: Abdominal muscle thickens into a wall of meat. Gain 2d6 + FRAME temporary HP; allies adjacent to you gain half that amount.

title: Reflex Carapace
description: Your skin reads the battlefield before your mind does. The first attack against you this round has disadvantage; if it misses, the attacker takes 1d4 + FRAME damage. Once per short rest.

title: Wound-Seal
description: Flesh closes over the gash before blood can leave it. When you drop below half HP, heal 1d6 + FRAME and end one Bleed or poison condition on yourself. Once per short rest.

title: Bone Blade
description: A femur splits and extrudes from your forearm, dripping marrow. Grow a melee weapon from your body for the encounter.

title: Serrated Lash
description: A tendon whips free of its sheath, tipped with fang-shards. Make a melee attack with 15-foot reach dealing 1d6 + IRON slashing; on hit, pull the target 5 feet toward you.

title: Splinter Burst
description: Cartilage shards tear loose of your skin in a cone. Damage all enemies in a short cone in front of you; you take a minor wound.

title: Hooked Limb
description: Fingers fuse into a barbed claw meant for catching meat. Your next melee attack this turn pierces armor (ignores resistance) and applies Bleed 1d4 at the end of each of the target's turns for 2 rounds.

title: Sigil of Binding
description: You drag a bloody glyph down your forearm; the target's chrome answers it. One enemy cannot Configure or activate augments next round.

title: Shared Resonance
description: Carve a twin rune — one on you, one on an ally within 30 feet. Until the end of your next turn, half the damage either of you takes is redirected to the other.

title: Hum of the Forge
description: A low resonant note emanates from the sigils in your skin. Allies within short range gain a small bonus to their next FRAME or IRON check.

title: Dissonant Mark
description: A contradictory glyph, cut deliberately wrong. The marked enemy takes an extra 1d8 resonant damage from the next attack made against them this round.

title: Fortress Form
description: Bone and plate fuse across your torso into an impenetrable shell. For 3 rounds, halve all damage you take (non-magical physical); your speed becomes 5 feet. Once per long rest.

title: The Hundred Hides
description: Every wound you have taken this fight pushes to the surface, hardening. Gain temporary HP equal to half the damage you have already sustained this combat (max 40). Once per short rest.

title: Spine Tree
description: Dozens of bone-blades erupt from your back, your arms, your jaw. All melee attacks you make this round hit every enemy within 5 feet (roll once, apply to each); you take 1d6 damage at end of round. Once per short rest.

title: The Shedding
description: Cast off a limb that has fully bladed over and hurl it (60-foot range) for 3d6 + IRON piercing damage; it ignores cover. The limb regrows at the start of your next turn.

title: Chorus of Marks
description: Every glyph you have cut this fight sings at once. All sigils you have placed on allies and enemies trigger their effect a second time.

title: Unmaking Rune
description: You carve a shape no body should hold. One target's augmentations, implants, and glyphs go silent for the rest of combat.

title: The Hand That Takes
description: Reach into an ally within range; one of their debuffs climbs up your arm and settles in your chest as a Loaded stack. Ally is cleansed.

title: Swallow the Hex
description: When an enemy curses an ally, step in and take the hit instead. Gain a Loaded stack and a beat of Guard.

title: Black Breath
description: Exhale the curses you carry as a cone of sickness. Spend Loaded stacks; each stack Exposes an enemy in the line.

title: Iron Stomach
description: Passive. The first debuff applied to you each round is absorbed as a Loaded stack instead of taking hold.

title: Bitter Gift
description: Spit a Loaded stack back at the thing that birthed it. Spend 1 Loaded to apply that curse's debuff to an enemy.

title: Deeper Well
description: Your ribs make room. Raise your Loaded stack cap; when you absorb at full, the overflow becomes Guard instead of being wasted.

title: A Taste For It
description: Passive upgrade. Once per turn, Absorb triggers twice — one curse for the count, one curse for the road.

title: White Hands
description: Press both palms to a stricken ally. Remove all debuffs from them; convert half into Loaded, burn the rest to nothing.

title: Litany of the Unmade
description: Speak the names of what you've eaten. Allies within hearing gain Fortify against the next debuff that would touch them.

title: Absolving Step
description: Move to a cursed ally and trade places with their suffering. You finish adjacent, they finish cleansed, you finish Loaded.

title: Saint's Hunger
description: Passive. When you cleanse an ally with any card, gain a beat of Regen. Mercy feeds you back.

title: Lightning Rod
description: Plant your feet and open. Until the start of your next turn, any debuff or curse aimed at an ally within 30 feet routes through you; you gain a Loaded stack and the original caster takes 1d8 + RESONANCE resonant damage.

title: Venom Palm
description: Strike with an open hand. Spend 1 Loaded; target takes a hit and inherits the exact debuff you swallowed.

title: Threaded Hex
description: Link two enemies with a filament of your Loaded count. For one round, debuffs applied to either are mirrored to the other.

title: Channel Strike
description: Passive. Your Loaded Strike empties one additional stack, and the overflow arcs to the nearest enemy within 15 feet as Bleed 1d4 for 2 rounds.

title: Bite Deeper
description: Force-feed yourself a curse from the field. Apply a random strong debuff to yourself and gain 2 Loaded stacks.

title: Black Tongue
description: Your mouth tastes like old iron. Passive: while you carry 3+ Loaded stacks, your melee hits apply Bleed.

title: Feeding Frenzy
description: Ignore your own suffering. Until the start of your next turn, debuffs on you deal no ill effect; each one instead adds a Loaded stack at end of turn (max 3 stacks gained). Once per short rest.

title: Second Mouth
description: Something grins beneath your skin. Spend HP to gain Loaded stacks at a one-to-one rate, up to your remaining cap.

title: Reliquary of Ruin
description: Open your chest like a book. All Loaded stacks leave you at once as a slow, ringing bell; every enemy in sight takes a hit per stack and every ally is cleansed.

title: Hunger Unchained
description: Unlatch for one round. Every debuff applied anywhere on the field — ally or enemy — first feeds you a Loaded stack before it resolves.

title: Unmaking Light
description: A lantern ignites in your sternum. Cleanse all debuffs from all allies in sight; the curses do not go to Loaded — they cease to have ever happened.

title: Last Confession
description: Kneel beside an ally at 0 HP and take everything. They revive with 2d6 + RESONANCE HP, fully cleansed; you gain 1 Loaded stack per debuff absorbed (max 3). Once per long rest.

title: Cathedral of Nerves
description: Stitch every enemy in the room to your Loaded count for one round. Any debuff applied to you is copied to all of them.

title: The Long Wire
description: Single devastating strike. Spend all Loaded stacks (minimum 3); deal 2d6 + RESONANCE damage per stack consumed to one target within 60 feet. Once per long rest.

title: Crown of Mouths
description: Transform for one round. Your Loaded cap doubles, your hits apply a random debuff on contact, and you cannot be cleansed by any source.

title: Eat the God
description: Target one enemy. Consume every status on them — buff or debuff — and add each as a Loaded stack. They end the turn empty and afraid.

title: Step Between
description: Slip sideways through the Veil. Move a short distance as if the terrain between living and dead were the same map; ignore intervening obstacles this step.

title: Always Listening
description: The iron-dead never stop whispering to you. Passive: at the start of each encounter, gain one grief stack; enemies that enter stealth near you are heard anyway.

title: Second Tongue
description: The dead taught you their syntax. Your next RESONANCE or VEIL check this turn can be made in either stat; use whichever is higher.

title: Grief-Fluent
description: You have learned to carry more of the afterlife at once. Your grief-stack ceiling is raised, and when you would gain a stack you instead gain two.

title: Void Vowel
description: Speak a sound that is not a sound. One enemy within 30 feet loses either their movement or one attack next turn (their choice); on a failed WIS save they instead lose both.

title: Unname
description: You take the target's name from the air for a heartbeat. Until the end of their next turn, allies of the target within 30 feet cannot buff or heal them, and attacks against the target gain advantage. CHA save negates.

title: Hollow Throat
description: Channel a voice that has no speaker. Make a VEIL attack that ignores armor but cannot score a critical; the target forgets what hit them and cannot identify your position on their next turn.

title: The Silence That Answers
description: Ask the void a question and accept its reply. Discard one card; name any enemy in the encounter — you learn one true fact the GM was hiding about them (affiliation, weakness, or hidden card).

title: Iron Counsel
description: Press your ear to the battlefield; the dead tell you what's coming. Peek at the top two cards of one enemy's action queue and may force them to discard one.

title: Translate the Wound
description: Every injury is a sentence the dead can read. Touch a wounded ally; your next attack this turn against the creature that last damaged them has advantage and deals an extra 1d8 damage.

title: Relay the Dead
description: Speak a dead warrior's last words into an ally's hand. Choose one ally; they may immediately play one of their discarded cards as if freshly drawn, at 1 AP less (min 1).

title: Chorus of the Iron Dead
description: Open your chest to every voice in the Iron Afterlife at once. VEIL-weighted area effect; all enemies in earshot are deafened and made legible — your allies' attacks against them this round gain advantage.

title: Declare the Wound
description: State an injury aloud and the world agrees. One enemy within 60 feet takes 1d6 + VEIL damage of your chosen type; they lose resistance to that type until the end of your next turn.

title: Decree of Stillness
description: Pronounce the stop. One enemy within 30 feet is Immobilized until the start of your next turn or until an ally damages them (whichever comes first). WIS save negates.

title: Name an Ally
description: Call an ally by the name they will earn. That ally's next card this round is played at 1 less AP (min 1) and cannot be reacted to.

title: Proclaim the Victor
description: Announce the outcome before it happens. Choose one enemy; they become Called until the end of the encounter. While Called, the first critical hit dealt to them deals maximum damage and applies Marked. Once per short rest.

title: The Word That Was a Blade
description: Speak a single syllable the iron-dead have been saving for you. VEIL+RESONANCE strike against one enemy; if it drops them, every grief stack you hold transfers as damage to the nearest remaining enemy.

title: Open the Relay
description: You become a channel instead of a speaker. Until the start of your next turn, every ally within earshot may spend your grief stacks instead of their own AP to play one card each.

title: Erase the Sentence
description: Unspeak the moment. The last enemy action resolved this round is retroactively undone — damage un-dealt, movement reversed, card returned to hand. You take 2d6 resonant backlash. Once per long rest.

title: The Mouth That Is Not
description: Open a void where your voice was. For two rounds, enemies who target you must first pass a RESONANCE check or lose the target entirely — they forget who they were aiming at.

title: Parliament of Wounds
description: Every iron-dead warrior within reach speaks at once through you. Summon a choir of spectral advisors; until end of encounter, you and allies may treat enemy actions as if you had seen them one card in advance.

title: Hear the Iron Accord
description: You listen past the battle to the pact that holds the Iron Afterlife open. Name any enemy in the encounter; you learn their true purpose here, and one bond they cannot break without breaking themselves — exploiting it this turn is devastating.

title: Speak It Into Being
description: Declare a condition of the battlefield and make it so for 1 round: an ally regains 4d6 + VEIL HP, or a 20-foot wall of resonance appears, or one enemy's weapon is Silenced. The world corrects afterward. Once per long rest.

title: Coronation Voice
description: Pronounce an ally the hero of this encounter. For 3 rounds, their crit range is 19-20 and enemies who target them first make a VEIL-DC save or the attack auto-misses. Once per long rest.

title: Second Suture
description: When you mend an ally, the thread pulls through you too. The first heal you cast each turn also restores 3 + SIGNAL HP to you.

title: Read the Wound
description: Lay a palm on any creature you can see. Learn its three lowest stats and whether its wounds are flesh, frame, or soul. Its next defense against you drops by 2.

title: Stitch the Unseamable
description: Close a wound the body has already given up on. Remove one permanent injury, severed limb effect, or death-wound on an ally for the rest of the scene; they take 6 irrevocable HP from you to do it.

title: Borrowed Pulse
description: Press your hand to an ally's sternum and give them one of your heartbeats. They gain Regen 4 and cannot drop below 1 HP until your next turn; you cannot regain HP this round.

title: Field Triage
description: Kneel in the blood and work fast. Restore 5 + SIGNAL HP to every bleeding or critical ally within 15 feet and clear one Bleed from each.

title: Promise of Return
description: Mark an ally with a sigil of your own blood. The next time they would die this scene, they instead collapse to 1 HP with Regen 3 and the sigil burns away.

title: Wrong Growth
description: Whisper to a wound and tell it what to become. Target bleeding creature within 20 feet: deal 6 + SIGNAL damage and add Bleed 2; each Bleed stack now also reduces its IRON by 1.

title: Mutiny of Meat
description: The target's own body turns on it. Organic enemy within 10 feet: Stagger and deal 4 + SIGNAL damage; the next attack that enemy makes also hits itself for half damage.

title: Rot Bloom
description: Plant a bloom of necrosis in a 10-foot zone. Creatures entering or starting their turn in it take 3 + SIGNAL damage and gain Bleed 1. Lasts 2 rounds.

title: Terror Sculpt
description: You shape a visible, impossible wound on a target and let them watch it form. Apply Expose 4 and Fear; enemies adjacent to the target must spend 1 extra AP to target it this round (or flee).

title: Bone Blade
description: Pull a spur of living bone from your forearm. For this scene, your basic attack deals +IRON damage and has reach 10 feet. You lose 4 HP when you draw it.

title: Gills and Gait
description: Grow a limb, a gill, a wing — whatever the moment demands. Until end of next turn, gain one: climb speed, swim speed, 10-foot leap, or darkvision. You may also ignore one difficult-terrain penalty.

title: Cast Off Skin
description: Shuck your current body like old clothes. Remove all debuffs and one wound on yourself; the discarded husk remains as difficult terrain in your space for 1 round.

title: Chitin Heart
description: Harden your core into plated shell. Gain Guard 6 + SIGNAL and resistance to Bleed until start of your next turn; while active, you cannot be healed by others.

title: Crimson Architecture
description: Reshape the battlefield through open wounds. Every bleeding creature within 30 feet: allies clear all Bleed and gain 10 + SIGNAL HP; enemies take 10 + SIGNAL damage and add Bleed 3.

title: Vow of Shared Scars
description: Cut your palm and press it to an ally's. For 3 rounds, half of any damage they take is dealt to you instead, and any HP either of you restores is split evenly between you both.

title: Last Thread
description: A fallen ally within 60 feet who died this scene sits up, whole. They return at half HP with Regen 5, but they owe a scar to you that the GM may call on once later.

title: Garden of Hands
description: Grow a ring of ghost-hands around you, each one a mender. For 3 rounds, each ally within 20 feet automatically gains 4 + SIGNAL HP and clears 1 Bleed at the start of their turn.

title: Unmake the Weave
description: Organic enemy within 30 feet unravels. Deal 20 + IRON damage; apply Bleed 5, Expose 5, and Stagger; on kill, the corpse detonates for half that damage in a 10-foot radius.

title: Plague Sculptor
description: Carve a disease into being and hand it to your enemies. Choose 3 enemies within 40 feet: each gains Bleed 2 and a custom debuff you name (GM approves); every time one of them acts, the debuff spreads to an adjacent enemy. Lasts 3 rounds.

title: Apex Form
description: Become the shape the fight demands. For 3 rounds, choose one each round: +IRON damage and reach (predator), +SIGNAL and flight (hawk), Guard 10 and Regen 4 (tortoise). Cannot be healed by others while transformed.

title: Swarm of Selves
description: Split your body into three lesser copies. Each acts on your turn with 1 AP, shares your HP pool, and can be anywhere within 40 feet. Lasts until one dies or you spend 1 AP to recombine.

title: Listen to the Anvil
description: Passive: once per encounter, the first time an ally's weapon or augment would break, the Forge Tender hears it cry and the break is held off one round.

title: Bellows Breath
description: Draw a slow breath and exhale onto an ally's gear; their next SIGNAL or RESONANCE check this round burns cleaner and hotter.

title: Name the Metal
description: Whisper the true name of a foe's weapon or armor (within 30 feet); for the next 3 rounds, your attacks against that target deal an extra 1d6 and the target has disadvantage on attacks made with the named weapon.

title: Heat Without Fire
description: Place a hand on a blade and pour RESONANCE into it; the metal glows without flame and the next ally attack with it lands as searing.

title: Tuning Strike
description: Tap a foe's armor at its resonant note; the plate rings like a struck bell and nearby allies hear where it is weakest.

title: The Living Forge
description: Plant your forge-stake on the ground; while it stands, allies within reach repair passively at the start of each round.

title: Temper the Hand
description: Run your palm along an ally's weapon; it sheds fatigue and sings. Their next attack this round cannot be parried or shielded, and adds 1d6 + RESONANCE damage on hit.

title: Hungry Edge
description: Feed a drop of your own blood to an ally's blade; it hungers for one round and each hit it lands draws a little back for you.

title: Rust Touch
description: Lay a finger on a foe's weapon within 5 feet; it browns and flakes. Their next attack this round deals minimum damage and on a roll of 1 the weapon is destroyed.

title: Work the Wrong Metal
description: Forge a shard from something that should not be worked — bone, void-iron, a memory. Hand it to an ally as a one-use cursed weapon that hits harder but frays its wielder.

title: Nails for the Dead
description: Drive a black nail into the ground at a fallen creature; if it tries to rise, stand, or reanimate before the round ends, it is pinned in place.

title: Imprint the Grip
description: Press an ally's palm to a fresh-forged hilt; the weapon learns their hand, and for the rest of the scene cannot be disarmed from them.

title: Call It Home
description: Speak the maker's name over an ally's dropped or thrown weapon; it returns to their hand as if remembering the way.

title: Twin Blades
description: Bind two ally weapons until the end of your next turn; when the first ally hits with an attack, the second ally makes a free weapon attack against a target within 10 feet for 1d6 + their stat.

title: The Weapon Remembers
description: Touch a foe's weapon and show it a truer maker; for one round it refuses to harm its wielder's allies and flinches from its own wielder.

title: The Seventh Vein
description: Open the seventh ore-vein inside yourself; for one round your touch mends armor, sharpens edges, and closes wounds as a single gesture across all adjacent allies.

title: Quench
description: Plunge a burning weapon into cold resonance; a chosen ally's next attack this round ignores resistance and AC bonuses from armor, then their weapon is Silenced (no specials) until next long rest. Once per short rest.

title: Unmake
description: Lay both hands on a crafted object — weapon, door, chain, idol — and unmake it back to ore. Works on anything forged, no matter how sacred or cursed, once per rest.

title: Chorus of Anvils
description: Strike the ground and wake every piece of forged metal in the field; until the start of your next turn, each ally's first weapon hit deals an extra 2d6 + RESONANCE resonant damage. Once per long rest.

title: Forge-Heart
description: Set your own heartbeat as the rhythm of the forge; while it beats, one chosen ally weapon cannot cool, cannot dull, and cannot be dropped.

title: Cursed Panoply
description: Pull a suit of armor out of the earth where no armor was buried; any ally who dons it gains frightful defense for the scene but leaves a piece of themselves behind when they take it off.

title: Oath-Breaker Nail
description: Drive the black nail through a foe's weapon into the ground; the weapon is pinned, the wielder cannot pick it up, and any oath or binding the weapon carried is broken.

title: Ghost in the Grip
description: Call the imprinted mind of a dead maker into an ally's weapon; for one round the weapon fights alongside the wielder as a second set of hands.

title: Unbind the Maker
description: Sever a foe's bond to their signature weapon or augment; for the rest of the scene the gear treats them as a stranger, failing, jamming, or refusing them outright.

title: Seam Opener
description: Split the air along a hairline crack. Your next melee attack this turn ignores cover, concealment, and shields, and on hit applies 1 Fracture stack.

title: Half-Step Between
description: Slide one foot into the Between. The next attack that targets you this round is made with disadvantage; if it misses, you teleport 10 feet as a reaction.

title: Hairline Ward
description: Draw a fault-line across your stance. Until your next turn, the first melee hit against you shatters harmlessly and grants you a Phantom Charge.

title: Widen the Crack
description: Grip a target's Fracture stacks and pull. Transfer one Fracture stack from this target to an adjacent enemy, then add one stack to both.

title: Echo Step
description: An afterimage peels away and walks where you intended to. Move your speed; the echo remains for one round and enemies may target it instead of you.

title: Listen to the Split
description: Press your ear to the broken air. Reveal all Fracture stacks, resonance auras, and hidden enemies within medium range until end of turn.

title: Stand in the Seam
description: Level-Up: You no longer close the crack behind you. Gain a permanent Phantom Charge cap increase and begin each combat with one charge.

title: Fracture Literacy
description: Level-Up: You have learned to read the grain of a break. When you apply Fracture, you may choose which resonance vein it settles into, gaining a minor rider of your choice.

title: Scarline Parry
description: The fracture running through your arm catches the blow first. Reaction when hit in melee: reduce damage by 1d8 + IRON and deal 1d6 resonant damage back to the attacker.

title: Wear the Break
description: Pull a Fracture stack off an enemy and graft it onto yourself. Gain temporary armor and a FRAME bonus until end of next turn.

title: Reclaimed Edge
description: Your blade hums with a fracture that used to be a wound. Your next attack this turn gains +1 die and applies Fracture on hit.

title: Debt Collected
description: Every scar remembers. When you reduce an enemy bearing Fracture to 0 HP, heal 1d4 per Fracture stack they carried and gain 1 Phantom Charge. Passive.

title: Fallen Honor Guard
description: Summon two phantom knights flanking an enemy within 30 feet. They impose disadvantage on the target's next attack; the first attack the target takes while flanked deals an extra 1d8 resonant. They fade at end of round.

title: Whisper of the Dead
description: A slain knight murmurs the next stroke to you. Gain advantage on your next RESONANCE check or attack; if you miss, the whisper keeps for one round.

title: Phalanx Echo
description: The old line forms around you. Until your next turn, adjacent allies gain cover from phantom shields and you may redirect one hit aimed at them.

title: Name the Dead
description: Speak a fallen knight's name aloud. Until the start of your next turn, choose one: +2 AC (guard), +1d6 damage on your next hit (strike), or advantage on your next save (vigil).

title: Drive the Spike
description: Slam your blade into the ground. Create a 10-foot-radius Fracture zone at your space lasting 3 rounds; enemies that enter or start their turn in it take 1d6 resonant damage and gain 1 Fracture stack.

title: Hold the Line
description: You refuse to move while the crack is open. Until start of your next turn, you cannot be forced-moved and adjacent enemies suffer -1 to attacks.

title: Tether the Break
description: Chain an enemy to a Fracture zone you created. They cannot leave the zone until they spend an action and succeed on a STR save to tear free, taking 2d6 resonant damage if they do.

title: Unyielding Seam
description: Passive: while you stand in a Fracture zone you created, you gain bonus armor and regenerate one Phantom Charge at the start of each of your turns.

title: Rend the Veil
description: Power: tear a visible 30-foot rift between here and the Between. For 3 rounds, any enemy crossing the line takes 3d6 + RESONANCE resonant damage and gains 2 Fracture stacks. Once per long rest.

title: Gallop of Ghosts
description: Power: a charge of ghost cavalry thunders through a 60-foot line. Every enemy in the line takes 4d6 + IRON resonant damage (STR save half) and is knocked prone on a failed save; allies in the line gain 1 Phantom Charge. Once per long rest.

title: Crowned by Scars
description: Subclass Power: break every scar at once. For 3 rounds, any damage you take is reduced by your IRON modifier; the attacker gains 1 Fracture stack and you gain 1 Phantom Charge (max 1 per round). Once per long rest.

title: The Wound That Wields
description: Subclass Power: pull every Fracture stack in sight into your blade. Your next attack this turn strikes each Fracture-marked target for 1d8 + IRON per stack consumed (stacks removed). Once per long rest.

title: The Last Charge
description: Subclass Power: call the entire fallen legion for one ride. A phalanx of phantom knights charges a wide line; all enemies struck are knocked back and Shaken for two rounds.

title: Roll Call
description: Subclass Power: name seven fallen knights. For each name, choose an effect from the legion list to resolve in turn order this round. Once spoken, a name cannot be called again for the mission.

title: Worldspike
description: Subclass Power: drive your blade into the Between itself and refuse to let it close. Create a massive Fracture zone lasting five rounds; you cannot leave it, and any enemy inside is slowed and bleeds Fracture.

title: Pillar of the Break
description: Subclass Power: become the hinge of a wound that will not close. You cannot be moved for 3 rounds and every enemy that attacks you gains 1 Fracture stack; at the end, each Fracture-marked enemy takes 1d8 + IRON resonant damage per stack (stacks removed). Once per long rest.

title: Hold the Line
description: Plant your banner and call the formation; until your next turn, allies within Command Zone cannot be pushed, pulled, or frightened.

title: Parley
description: Raise an open hand and speak the old battlefield word; one enemy who can hear and understand you must choose to disengage or accept your VEIL check before attacking.

title: Advance
description: Signal forward with voice and hand; one willing ally within 30 feet may move up to their speed as a reaction, ignoring opportunity attacks.

title: The Herald's Word
description: Your voice carries the authority of the banner; when an ally within earshot fails a RESONANCE or morale check, you may spend this card to let them reroll.

title: Banner Raised
description: Plant your standard; while it stands, your Command Zone's radius increases and allies inside cannot be flanked.

title: Speak Plainly
description: You have learned the cadence that cuts through fear; once per combat, end one charmed, frightened, or compelled effect on yourself or an ally within earshot.

title: No Step Back
description: Shout the oldest oath of the banner; until the start of your next turn, allies within 30 feet reduce incoming damage by your IRON modifier while you can see them and remain standing.

title: Rally Strike
description: Strike for 1d8 + IRON damage and call a charge; on hit, each ally within 30 feet may shift 5 feet toward an enemy as a reaction.

title: Standard Bearer
description: So long as you hold the banner aloft, allies in sight of it add your VEIL bonus to their saves against fear and despair.

title: Iron Hymn
description: Begin the marching hymn (sustained until end of combat or you stop singing). Each round, allies within 30 feet gain +1 to attack rolls and advantage on fear saves; enemies in range have disadvantage on morale checks.

title: Cease Fire
description: Raise the neutral sign; choose two enemies within 30 feet, they cannot attack each other or you until one of them is attacked again, or for 2 rounds. WIS save negates.

title: Name the Grievance
description: Speak aloud what the enemy truly wants; one humanoid enemy in earshot must make a RESONANCE check or lose their next attack action to argue with you.

title: White Flag
description: Walk the line between the armies; until the start of your next turn, enemies who have not already struck you this combat cannot target you with attacks. WIS save allows them to ignore.

title: Terms of Surrender
description: Offer quarter to a wounded foe within 30 feet. If a humanoid enemy is below half HP, they make a CHA save or surrender/flee; on a successful save they fight on at disadvantage for their next attack.

title: Relay Order
description: Flick a battlefield sign; one ally in Command Zone may immediately play a card from their hand at cost, using your initiative slot.

title: Read the Field
description: You see the engagement one beat ahead; until the start of your next turn, the first attack each ally makes against your Priority Mark has advantage and deals +1d6 damage on hit.

title: Flare
description: Fire the coded flare; every ally within 60 feet learns the positions and HP of every enemy you can see until the end of the round, and gains +1 to attack rolls against them.

title: Reposition
description: Call the rotation; two allies within 30 feet swap places and each may make a free weapon attack (1d6 + stat) against an enemy adjacent to their former position.

title: The Long Address
description: Step onto high ground and speak as heralds spoke before the wars; until the start of your next turn, allies in earshot ignore fear and exhaustion and their next attack gains your VEIL bonus.

title: Oath of the Crossed Hands
description: Invoke the oldest herald's oath; for 1 round, no creature within 30 feet may make the first attack without first failing a WIS save. Any who break the oath take 3d6 resonant damage. Once per long rest.

title: Unbroken Line
description: While you stand and the banner flies, allies within 30 feet who would drop to 0 HP instead remain at 1 HP (once per ally per combat). Lasts until the end of the round. Once per long rest.

title: Charge of the Third Cohort
description: Call the name of a cohort long dead; up to 4 allies within 30 feet each move up to their speed toward an enemy and make one free weapon attack (+2 to hit). Once per long rest.

title: The Word That Ends Wars
description: Speak the single syllable heralds are forbidden to teach; every humanoid enemy within earshot must make a RESONANCE save or drop their weapons and spend their next turn not attacking.

title: Both Sides of the Table
description: For one round, you speak in two voices at once; you may take a second reaction each round, and the first time an ally would be attacked by a humanoid enemy, you may redirect the attacker's action into a RESONANCE contest instead.

title: Orchestrated Volley
description: Conduct the firing line; up to 4 allies with ranged attacks fire at a single enemy within 60 feet as a reaction (each ally rolls a free attack). Priority Mark on that enemy persists until end of encounter. Once per long rest.

title: Perfect Column
description: Until the end of your next turn, your allies act in the order you call; you set the initiative of every willing ally in Command Zone and they may interrupt each other's turns with reactions.

title: Standing Stone
description: Root into a chosen tile; while you do not move, incoming shove and displacement are refused and your IRON checks take advantage.

title: Hum of the Bell
description: Strike the air; one enemy within 30 feet loses their reaction and has disadvantage on their next save until the start of their next turn.

title: Second Breath
description: Once per combat, inhale the stillness you have gathered and refresh one spent defense or reaction card.

title: Temple Stance
description: Adopt the first form taught at the temple; gain a standing bonus to RESONANCE checks and your unarmed strikes count as blessed until you move more than one tile.

title: Seven Thousand Forms
description: Cycle through the canonical forms; if you played an attack last turn, the next attack this turn deals damage of a type of your choice (ignoring resistance to that type) and adds +1d4 damage.

title: Canonical Strike
description: A textbook-perfect blow delivered exactly as the founders wrote it; on a hit, the target cannot play reaction cards against you until end of round.

title: Vow of Silence
description: Take the vow for one round; you may not speak or cast, but you cannot be mentally influenced and your IRON defense hardens.

title: Hand of the Abbot
description: Invoke temple authority; one ally within sight who can see you gains your IRON stance bonus until your next turn.

title: Shatter Tone
description: Strike a note no scripture allows; one object, shield, or brittle construct within 30 feet takes 2d6 resonant damage and is cracked (disadvantage on its next use or save).

title: Unwritten Form
description: Invent a form on the spot; this turn your movement does not provoke opportunity attacks and your first unarmed strike gains advantage.

title: Sympathy
description: Attune to one creature within 30 feet; until your next turn, you sense its exact location through walls and your first attack against it gains +1d6 resonant damage.

title: Heretic Chord
description: Sing the forbidden triad; enemies within earshot that rely on spoken incantations lose one card from their next turn's pool.

title: Graft Fist
description: Press a living augment into your knuckle; your next unarmed attack this turn deals +1d6 damage and ignores 2 points of armor.

title: Devotional Scar
description: Open an old mark and close it with a prayer; spend a hit die and gain temporary protection equal to the roll until end of combat.

title: Marrow Brace
description: Lock your skeleton into prayer posture; until your next turn, the first forced movement, prone, or stagger effect against you automatically fails.

title: Living Reliquary
description: Your body stores a relic's hum; once per combat, discharge it to end one ongoing effect on yourself or an adjacent ally.

title: Slip Stance
description: Between one breath and the next, change your footing; after any enemy's movement ends adjacent to you, shift one tile before they act.

title: Hollow Step
description: Walk the gap; become untargetable until the start of your next turn, but you cannot act while hollow.

title: Mirror Cut
description: Strike from the stance you have not yet taken; your next attack this turn hits with advantage as though from flanking, whether or not you moved, and deals +1d6 damage.

title: Two Rooms
description: For a breath, you exist in two places; until end of turn, you may count as standing in your current tile or any tile adjacent to it for line-of-sight and cover.

title: Thousand Bell Cascade
description: Release a cascade of resonant tones; every enemy within 30 feet takes 4d6 + RESONANCE resonant damage (CON save half) and has disadvantage on their next concentration check. Once per long rest.

title: Recitation of the Founders
description: Speak aloud the unbroken lineage; for 1 round, you and allies within 30 feet are immune to charm, frighten, and compulsion, and your first attack each turn deals +1d6 resonant damage. Once per short rest.

title: Sealed Form
description: Execute the technique forbidden outside the high temple; one strike that auto-hits for 6d6 + RESONANCE damage and cannot be reduced except by immunity, but you may not attack again this combat. Once per long rest.

title: The Seventh Vein
description: Find the hidden resonant channel in a living target within 60 feet; the next attack against them this round deals maximum damage, and you sense their location for the rest of combat. Once per short rest.

title: Dissonant Chorus
description: Loose every tone you have swallowed; all enemies within 60 feet take 4d6 + RESONANCE resonant damage (WIS save half) and drop one held card or readied item. Once per long rest.

title: The Body As Altar
description: Offer your flesh as a relic; for 3 rounds, each time you take damage, an ally within 30 feet heals for half that amount (minimum 1). Once per long rest.

title: Communion of Iron
description: Fuse briefly with an adjacent ally's augments; until end of your next turn, you share defense values and each of you may use one of the other's cards once.

title: The Unfinished Step
description: Begin a step you never complete; choose a tile within sight, and until the start of your next turn you are considered to be in both your current tile and that tile for all purposes.

title: Interval Strike
description: Strike in the instant between two heartbeats; resolve an attack against any target within 60 feet before any other action this round for 3d8 + RESONANCE damage, ignoring turn order. Once per long rest.

title: Oath Deepened
description: Spend a breath on the vein-mark carved into your palm; the next discipline card you play this turn costs 1 less AP (minimum 0).

title: Tempered Breath
description: Draw a slow, measured breath through clenched teeth; gain temporary HP equal to your RESONANCE and your next melee hit this turn adds your RESONANCE modifier to the damage.

title: Banner Cut
description: Plant your blade in the earth and name your ward. Make a melee attack; on hit, you and your ward gain a bonus to AC until the start of your next turn.

title: House Command
description: Speak a clipped, formal order in the voice of the House. One ally within sight may immediately use their reaction to move up to their speed or make one weapon attack.

title: Forged Dominion
description: Claim a 10-foot square around you as the Lord's ground; enemies that enter or start their turn there have disadvantage on attacks not targeting you until the start of your next turn.

title: Sealed Retinue
description: Press your oath-seal against an ally's armor. Until the start of your next turn, any damage that ally takes from an attack is reduced by your IRON modifier, and you take half of the reduced amount.

title: Void Cut
description: Draw your blade through the space between thoughts. Make a melee attack; on hit, the target loses one beneficial condition or concentration effect of your choice.

title: Memory Sever
description: Your next attack this turn cuts something deeper than flesh; on hit, the target cannot use any card or reaction it used on its previous turn until the end of its next turn.

title: Between-Step
description: Step sideways through the void between moments. Teleport up to 20 feet to a space you can see; the first attack you make before the end of your turn is made with advantage.

title: Silent Edict
description: Draw the void-edge along your oath-mark and speak a single syllable no one hears. One creature within 30 feet is Silenced and cannot use spoken or resonance-channeled abilities until the start of your next turn.

title: Ledger Mark
description: Carve a tally into the haft of your blade with your thumb. Mark one enemy as a debt; while marked, your attacks against it deal bonus RESONANCE damage and you know its direction while it lives.

title: Collector's Strike
description: Make a melee attack against a debt-marked creature; on hit, deal bonus damage equal to the number of debts you currently hold, and transfer one of your debts to this creature if it was unmarked.

title: Weight of the Owed
description: Take the burden of an unfinished obligation onto your shoulders. Until the start of your next turn, you cannot be knocked prone, moved, or reduced below 1 HP by any source except a debt-marked creature.

title: Promise Kept
description: Reaction: when a debt-marked creature within 30 feet is reduced to 0 HP by anyone, regain HP equal to your IRON modifier plus your level and remove the debt; you may immediately mark another enemy you can see.

title: Scar Sutra
description: Run a thumb along the prayer-scars down your forearm; until the start of your next turn, damage dealt to you is reduced by your RESONANCE modifier and your melee attacks deal that same amount as bonus damage.

title: Offering Wound
description: Spend HP equal to twice your level as a deliberate cut; your next melee attack this turn automatically hits and cannot be reduced by resistance, only by immunity.

title: Pillar Stance
description: Set your feet and become the pillar of the temple. Until you move, enemies within 5 feet have disadvantage on attack rolls against allies, and the first attack each turn against you triggers a free melee attack in return.

title: Consecrated Flesh
description: Press your palm to a fresh wound and bless it. End one disease, poison, or curse on yourself, and the next source of the same type that strikes you before your next long rest is automatically nullified.

title: Katana of the Vein
description: For one minute, your bonded blade hums with your Vein Oath. You add your RESONANCE modifier to all melee attack and damage rolls, and once per round a hit forces a WIS save or target is stunned until the start of your next turn.

title: Ironfield Meditation
description: Drop into kneeling guard; a 15-foot aura of stillness surrounds you for one minute. Allies within gain your IRON modifier to AC and saves, and you cannot move but gain +10 to attack and damage when struck in melee.

title: Vein of the Seven Cuts
description: Exhale once and make up to three melee attacks as a single motion against any combination of targets within reach. If all three hit, make a fourth attack that cannot miss.

title: The Unbreaking Command
description: Speak the Lord's binding word. For one minute, allies within 30 feet are immune to frightened and charmed, cannot be reduced below 1 HP while you stand, and gain your IRON modifier as bonus damage on the first hit each turn.

title: Throne of Iron
description: Anchor the battlefield as the seat of the House. You and your ward gain 3 levels' worth of temporary HP; any enemy within 20 feet that attacks someone other than you provokes a free attack from you.

title: Unmemory Cut
description: Draw a single line through a target's fate. On hit, the creature must succeed on a CHA save or forget it knew you for one minute and cannot target you with attacks or abilities. On a critical hit, the effect persists until it rests.

title: Void Procession
description: Step fully into the between for six seconds. You are invisible and incorporeal; the first melee attack you make upon returning is an automatic critical that severs one class feature of the target until it completes a long rest.

title: The Final Ledger
description: Close the books. One debt-marked creature within 60 feet must succeed on a CON save or take damage equal to half its missing HP; if this reduces it to 0, the debt is settled and you recover all expended short-rest resources.

title: Creditor Ascendant
description: Name every debt you still carry. For one minute, you ignore damage from any non-debt creature, deal double your RESONANCE modifier as bonus damage per hit to debt-marked creatures, and gain one reaction per debt you hold.

title: The Shrine That Walks
description: Your scars bloom into living sutras. For one minute, healing done to you overflows to allies within 10 feet, melee damage you take is halved, and each attack you make inflicts one stack of Bleed matching your RESONANCE.

title: Burning Sanctum
description: Ignite the living temple. You drop to half HP immediately; for the next minute, each melee attack against you is reflected as resonant damage equal to your level, and your own attacks ignore resistance and deal maximum damage on hit.

title: Balanced Books
description: Every wound has a counter-entry. As a reaction to taking damage, spend 1 AP to open a ledger against the attacker — they take equal VEIL-weighted pressure damage the next time they act.

title: Courier's Step
description: You have walked worse alleys with heavier purses. Move without provoking reactions; the first enemy whose space you pass takes a minor EDGE nick as you go by.

title: Coin for Silence
description: Flick a weighted trade-chit into a throat, a lock, or a guard's open palm. Minor EDGE strike that also silences the target's next vocal or signaling action.

title: Well-Tailored
description: Your coat is armored under the silk. Passive: gain a small VEIL bonus to incoming attacks while at least one ally is between you and the attacker, and you cannot be identified as combatant-class on a failed VEIL check.

title: Favorable Terms
description: Open the negotiation from a bad angle. As a reaction when an enemy would crit you, spend 1 AP to convert the crit into a standard hit and draw a card — you remember every blow that lands.

title: Running Tally
description: Passive: each time an enemy attacks you this encounter, place a tally on them (max 5 per target); your next strike against a tallied enemy deals +1 damage per tally spent (max +5). Tallies reset at end of encounter.

title: Buyer's Eye
description: You see what a person is worth before they do. Study one enemy; learn their weakest save and highest resistance. Your next VEIL or EDGE check against them this encounter treats that knowledge as leverage.

title: Cut the Caravan
description: You already know which wagon holds the powder. Make an EDGE attack against an enemy; if it hits, they lose access to one equipment or consumable for the rest of the encounter.

title: Dry the Well
description: Logistics is geography. Mark a 15-foot-radius zone within 60 feet; enemies who end their turn in that zone cannot be healed until the start of your next turn. CHA save negates.

title: Empty the Ledger
description: Whatever they were saving for later is yours now. Choose an enemy with active buffs or prepared reactions; strip one of them and gain a resource token for yourself.

title: Starving Route
description: An army travels on its stomach; a squad travels on its ammunition. For the rest of this encounter, each time an enemy uses a limited-resource ability, they take minor VEIL damage — the route is empty and they notice too late.

title: Silk and Edge
description: The knife is hidden in the lining of a coat that costs more than a guard's yearly wage. Make an EDGE strike; if the target has not yet acted this combat, they cannot react to this attack.

title: Invitation Only
description: You do not kill in hallways. Move to any point adjacent to an enemy without provoking reactions; bystanders and lower-tier foes do not notice the repositioning.

title: The Toast
description: Raise the glass. Smile. Mark one enemy as the Honored Guest; until they fall or for 3 rounds, your strikes against them gain +1d6 and your strikes against anyone else are at -2 to hit.

title: Receiving Line
description: Every guest files past the host. EDGE attack that resolves against up to three adjacent enemies in sequence; the card ends the moment one of them survives the cut.

title: Owe Me One
description: Grant an ally an immediate extra action this turn; they owe you a Debt token. You may spend their Debt later to force a reroll on any check they make.

title: Crown a Pawn
description: Choose a minion-tier enemy or neutral NPC in view; until your next turn, they are promoted in your narrative — their actions count as against their own side and allies treat them as a high-priority target.

title: The Whispered Name
description: You tell one ally who the real leader is. That ally's next attack against a commander, elite, or named enemy this round deals +2d6 damage and ignores resistance.

title: Quiet Succession
description: When a named enemy falls this turn, immediately promote an adjacent enemy into a Debtor — they are now marked as owing you their survival, and any attack they make against you this encounter costs them 1 extra AP.

title: Hostile Takeover
description: Call in every favor. Every enemy on the field with an active debt, tally, or mark you placed this encounter is struck simultaneously by VEIL-weighted consequence damage; survivors lose 1 AP next turn.

title: The Price of Doing Business
description: There is always a cost. Until the start of your next turn, the next 2 debuffs or status effects that would land on you are redirected to the nearest enemy within 15 feet instead. Once per short rest.

title: The Siege
description: You have been cutting their supply lines. For 3 rounds, each enemy begins their turn with 1 fewer AP (minimum 1 AP remaining); the first time each enemy uses a consumable or summon, it fails. Once per long rest.

title: Burn the Warehouse
description: A warehouse three streets over goes up in flames. Every enemy in the encounter loses one active buff, one prepared reaction, or one queued ability — you pick which per target.

title: The Gala
description: You set the scene. For 3 rounds, when you hit an enemy while not being targeted by any attack this round, the hit is a critical; draw 1 card each time you drop a named target. Once per long rest.

title: The Last Course
description: Dessert is served. Make a single EDGE strike with every piece of advantage you have earned this encounter compressed into one cut; if the target dies, all other enemies in the room lose their next reaction — no one wants to be next.

title: Coronation
description: Name one ally the Crowned. For 3 rounds, Crowned ally's first attack each round costs 1 less AP (minimum 0), and enemies who attack them provoke a free EDGE riposte from you (1d6 + EDGE, once per round). Once per long rest.

title: Call the Debts
description: Every favor, promotion, and whispered name paid out this encounter returns to your hand as leverage. Every Debt, Debtor, Honored Guest, and Crown you have placed this fight detonates — their bearers suffer VEIL-weighted consequence damage and cannot heal until your next turn.

title: Ward of Salt and Iron
description: Reaction: when an undying or Between-entity enters your adjacent space, it halts and its next manifestation check suffers — the old wards still bite.

title: Severing Parry
description: Reaction: intercept an incoming attack from your marked quarry; reduce the damage by 1d8 + EDGE and add 1 Unbinding stack to the quarry.

title: Hunter's Senses
description: Passive: you perceive resonance bleed the way others see smoke. Undying, shell-state, and Between-touched foes cannot remain hidden from you at close range.

title: Second Mark
description: Level-up: you may now carry a second Hunter's Mark at once. Splitting your attention costs you none of the bonus against either quarry.

title: Tempered Edge
description: Level-up: your blade is scored with resonance-grooves. Once per round, when you hit a marked quarry, you may spend 0 AP to apply a minor dissolution rider to the strike.

title: The Long Hunt
description: Enter a sustained hunt-state against a single quarry within sight. Each round the hunt persists, your strikes against the quarry gain +1d6 damage (max +3d6). Break line-of-sight for a full round and the hunt ends. Once per long rest.

title: Unmaking Cut
description: A strike placed precisely where the quarry's form is weakest-bound. Melee attack for 1d8 + EDGE; on hit, the target cannot recover HP from any source for 2 rounds.

title: Thread Pull
description: Against a marked quarry, seize a visible resonance-thread and drag. The target staggers toward you and its next manifestation check is disrupted.

title: Salt the Wound
description: Apply dissolution reagent to an unmaking wound. A target with Unmaking Cut applied takes an extra 1d6 resonant damage at the start of each of its turns for 3 rounds and cannot benefit from healing.

title: Final Stanza
description: Reaction: when a quarry with unmaking wounds drops below its final threshold, speak the closing phrase — the target cannot be stabilized, summoned-back, or resurrected this scene.

title: Rite of Erasure
description: A short ritual cut, woven mid-combat. The quarry's true-name anchor is severed; no ally of yours counts it as a returning foe, and the dead stay dead this scene.

title: Hollow the Form
description: Pour dissolution-resonance into the quarry until its outline shivers. For the rest of the scene the target is treated as a form barely holding itself together — every unmaking effect against it hits harder.

title: Grave Spike
description: Drive a resonance-marked spike into the ground beneath a downed foe. While the spike holds, that corpse cannot be re-animated, possessed, or called back.

title: Hold the Line of Death
description: Draw a line of ash between you and a re-manifesting spirit. The target cannot cross, and each attempt to cross drains more of its anchoring reserve.

title: Binding Verse
description: Recite a short verse over a spirit or shell-state entity. It becomes fixed in place; any movement or shift through Between-space requires it to break the verse first.

title: Last Rites
description: Reaction: when an enemy would re-manifest, speak its last rites instead. It finishes dying properly, and any tether it had to the world frays inert.

title: The Still Ground
description: Consecrate the battlefield for the rest of the scene. Nothing can be summoned, raised, or re-manifested inside its bounds; existing undying suffer ongoing anchor-strain.

title: Bury the Name
description: You speak a true-name into the earth and close it over. The named entity cannot return to this scene, nor to the next, and allies who knew it forget it was ever a threat.

title: Essence Tap
description: On felling an undying or Between-entity, siphon a sliver of its essence into a reserve vial. You gain a stored Essence charge.

title: Burn a Vial
description: Crack an Essence vial over your next action. Spend 1 Essence charge to fuel a card this turn as if you had spent 1 additional AP on it.

title: Borrowed Edge
description: Coat your weapon with harvested oni-essence. Your next strike this turn ignores resistance and deals +1d8 damage of the target's own damage type.

title: Vial Shatter
description: Hurl a charged Essence vial at a point. It bursts in a resonance-plume; enemies caught within suffer disruption to their next enhancement or manifestation check.

title: Heart of Vials
description: Open your collected reserve all at once. For 3 rounds, you may spend Essence charges in place of AP on Oni Hunter cards (1 charge per 1 AP, max 2 AP per round via this effect). Once per long rest.

title: Wear the Oni
description: Drink down a stored oni-essence. For 3 rounds, you gain resistance to that oni's damage type, your strikes deal +2d6 of that type, and enemies of the same kind have disadvantage on their first attack against you. Once per long rest.

title: Steady Breath
description: Inhale, align, exhale. The next pulse-shot this turn benefits from a calmed pulse and finds its mark with unusual ease.

title: Harmonic Tuning
description: Retune the resonance in your pulse-arm between shots. Your next ranged card costs one less AP (minimum 1).

title: Pin the Breath
description: Strike the narrow point between a foe's ribs for 1d6 + EDGE damage. On hit, the target's initiative drops to last on the next round (CON save negates).

title: Thread the Seam
description: Find the hairline seam in armor or augment plating. This shot ignores cover and partial defenses against a single marked target.

title: One Grain of Sand
description: Collapse your focus to a single bright grain. You cannot target anything but your mark this turn, but the shot lands with unflinching precision.

title: Heartline
description: Trace the pulse and fire where it beats loudest. Ranged strike for 1d6 + SIGNAL resonant damage; on hit, the target has disadvantage on their next attack.

title: Dampening Shot
description: Ranged pulse strike for 1d4 + SIGNAL damage; on hit, one of the target's augments or resonant abilities is Silenced until the end of their next turn. CON save negates silence.

title: Choke the Chord
description: Fire into the resonant line between a foe and their augment. They cannot activate or gain benefit from that augment on their next turn.

title: Null Round
description: Load a sliver of flat, dead resonance into the chamber. The next enemy card that triggers a resonance effect within line of sight fizzles.

title: Silence the Forge
description: A wide pulse of anti-resonance rolls across the field. Augments in the area sputter and dim; foes lose augment-granted bonuses until the start of your next turn.

title: Kindled Bolt
description: Skip the physical slug entirely. A lance of pure resonance leaves your hand, curving slightly toward the target's own hum.

title: Chorus Round
description: Fire a single resonant shot that splits into a chord mid-flight, striking up to three targets in a tight arc.

title: Echo Mark
description: Your resonant bolt sinks into a target and hums. On your next turn, your first ranged card against that target arrives echoed — it hits twice.

title: Ghost Shell
description: Fire a resonance with no matter behind it. The shot passes through walls, armor, and allies, finding only the target you named.

title: Calling the Pulse
description: You raise your arm and the air hums. Until the end of your next turn, every pulse-shot you fire inherits the damage type of your first target this turn and deals +1d6 resonant damage to any creature sharing that type. Once per short rest.

title: Long Exhale
description: You take the shot that only exists for a heartbeat. Draw a bead on any foe in line of sight, regardless of range, and fire a single pulse that ignores distance entirely.

title: Standing Wave
description: Plant your feet and lock into a firing cadence. While you remain still, every turn you spend at least 1 AP on ranged cards grants your next shot a sharper, louder pulse.

title: The Seventh Vein
description: Old Pulse-Caller teaching. Name a foe; your next pulse-strike this turn auto-hits for 4d8 + SIGNAL damage and ignores line of sight and cover. Once per long rest.

title: Final Aim
description: You stop breathing and the world stops with you. Spend the turn aiming; your next card next turn is treated as an automatic critical, ignoring cover, armor, and partial concealment.

title: Iron Vigil
description: You become a silence in the field. Enemies within medium range of you cannot activate augment-tagged cards until the end of your next turn; you cannot move this turn.

title: Unforge
description: One foe's augment goes dark for the rest of the fight. Their body remembers how it used to feel, and it does not like it — they are shaken until they act again.

title: Sung Bullet
description: You speak the target's name into the chamber. The resonant bolt will find them before the end of your next turn, ignoring cover, walls, and intervening foes.

title: Cathedral Note
description: Fire one resonant shot that keeps singing. It passes through up to three foes in a line, and each hit target hears the note for a full round — their next action is slowed.

title: String Step
description: Yank a binding thread taut and vault along it. Move up to your speed to any space within line of sight of a creature you have bound; this movement doesn't provoke reactions.

title: Jerk the Thread
description: Reaction: when an ally within 30 feet is targeted by an attack, pluck your strings. A bound creature you can see is forced to lurch into the attack's path, becoming the new target.

title: Strings of the Silent
description: Passive: you are always aware of the direction and approximate distance of any creature you currently have bound, and whispers traveling your threads cannot be overheard by anyone else.

title: Thread Whisper
