description: Send a quiet command down a binding thread to a creature you control. It takes one simple free-action instruction (drop item, speak a word, look left, open hand) at its next opportunity without its allies noticing.

title: Sever the Strings
description: Tighten every thread at once and drop them. All bound creatures take resonant damage equal to your SIGNAL modifier per bind on them; you release all your binds.

title: Tightened Weave
description: Pass your fingers through your open palm; the weave responds. The next bind you apply this turn counts as two stacks for the purpose of Thread Assault and Sever the Strings.

title: Spooled Reserve
description: Unspool a length of thread you had hidden against your forearm. Gain one extra binding thread in reserve until your next long rest; binds you apply this turn cannot be dispelled by a single action.

title: The Loom-Plan
description: Trace a tactical diagram in the air with a taut thread. Choose up to three creatures within 60 feet; until the start of your next turn, the first attack each of them makes is routed by your design and gains advantage.

title: Crossbeam
description: Draw a thread between two bound creatures within 60 feet; until the start of your next turn, half the damage or forced movement one receives is mirrored onto the other. The weaker may make a STR save at start of turn to break free.

title: Rerouted Assault
description: Reaction: when a bound creature makes an attack, redirect it to another target within the bound one's reach or range; use the original roll. Once per round.

title: Schematic Snare
description: Lay an invisible lattice of threads across a 20-foot square you can see. The first enemy to enter or cross it becomes bound, takes a SIGNAL check penalty to move, and reveals its position to your whole network for one minute.

title: Borrowed Hand
description: Slip a fraction of your will into a bound creature's off hand. Until the start of your next turn, as a free action once per turn you may use one of its non-magical items, weapons, or tools as if it were in your own hand.

title: Wear the Face
description: Press your consciousness against a bound creature's features; its expressions, voice, and mannerisms become yours to puppet for one minute. Allies of the target treat its speech and gestures as trustworthy unless they witness a clear betrayal.

title: Puppet-Skin
description: When a bound creature within sight would take damage, make a VEIL check. On a success, you shunt half of that damage into your own body through the thread; you gain advantage on your next attack against whoever struck them.

title: Inhabit Briefly
description: Send your mind down the thread and crouch behind a bound creature's eyes for a single round. You perceive as it perceives, may make one SIGNAL or VEIL check using its stats, and return knowing one truth it knew.

title: Shared Eye
description: The network sees as one. Until the end of your next turn, you and every creature currently bound to you share line of sight; none of you can be flanked, surprised, or affected by illusions while a single member resists them.

title: Returned Pull
description: The strings run both ways; you feel it tonight. When a creature bound to you takes damage, take half of that damage yourself; your next card this turn costs 1 less AP and adds that damage to its effect.

title: Chorus Command
description: Speak a single order through every thread at once. All bound creatures immediately take the same short action on their initiative (move 10 feet, draw a weapon, stand up, or strike the nearest non-bound enemy).

title: Thought-Mesh
description: Your network's minds braid into a single weave. Until the start of your next turn, any ally connected to your threads may use your SIGNAL modifier in place of their own on one check or save; you take 1 resonant damage each time they do.

title: The Grand Unweaving
description: For one minute, any creature that attacks you or an ally within 20 feet has a binding thread immediately attach to them; each attached thread imposes a penalty to their next attack and lets you apply a free Minor Bind on your turn.

title: Marionette Chorus
description: Raise your hands like a conductor. For one minute, on your turn you may spend 1 AP to have every bound creature immediately make one basic attack against a target of your choice; the first chorus each round is free.

title: The Master Loom
description: Unroll a loom of light from your palm and hang the battlefield from it. For one minute, every enemy within 60 feet counts as lightly bound by you; you may direct any two of them to act against each other at the start of each of your turns.

title: Fate-Weave
description: Write the next minute of battle into a living diagram. For 3 rounds, once per round before any attack roll you can see within 60 feet you may declare hit, miss, or critical miss (max 1 critical miss per use). Once per long rest.

title: Wholesale Tenancy
description: You vacate your body and move into a bound creature entire. For one minute, you control it as yourself; your own body falls senseless but breathing. If the host dies, you return with one level of exhaustion and its final memory.

title: Skinwalker's Choir
description: Sleeve yourself into up to three bound creatures at once; your will is in each like a candle in a lantern. On each of your turns, you may take one action through each host, and no host knows which hand is yours.

title: Hive Ascendant
description: The network wakes as one mind. For 3 rounds, you and up to 3 bound creatures share a single HP pool (combined total), share reactions (max 1 per round total), and split damage evenly across the network. Once per long rest.

title: The Weave Returns
description: The strings pull back through you. Each bound creature may spend their reaction to pour a portion of their strength into you; for each that does, gain temporary HP equal to their level and add their best attack modifier to yours for one round.

title: Sharpened Exile
description: Years alone hone the edge. Your next EDGE check this turn is made with a steadier hand and a colder eye.

title: Oathless Read
description: No lord's protocols cloud your sight. Study one enemy within 60 feet; learn one resistance or vulnerability they carry, and your next strike against them this turn deals +1d8 damage.

title: Refusal Stance
description: Take the stance no master taught. Until your next turn, the first melee attack against you automatically misses (blade-turned, footwork perfect). Once per short rest.

title: Honed Cut
description: A strike refined by ten thousand solitary repetitions. Precision-weighted EDGE attack; treats armor as thinner than it is.

title: Clean Form
description: Breathe. Reset. Discard 1 card; draw 1. If the discarded card was a combat_card, your next attack this turn gains advantage and deals +1d4 damage.

title: Solitary Perfection
description: For one moment there is no court, no lord, no school — only the cut. EDGE attack that cannot miss a target you are alone with (no allies adjacent).

title: Name the Price
description: Point at one enemy within 60 feet. That target becomes your Mark until end of encounter; your attacks against Marks deal +1d6 damage, and attacks against non-Marks are made at -2 to hit unless they struck you first.

title: Blood Invoice
description: The contract is specific. Spend 1 AP to deal an IRON-weighted strike to your Mark; if it hits, you recover AP spent on this card next turn.

title: Paid in Full
description: When a Mark dies, the contract pays out. Draw one card and gain 1d6 + EDGE temporary HP; the ledger is closed. Once per short rest.

title: No Collateral
description: The contract forbids waste. When an enemy attacks an ally, make an EDGE reaction against that enemy; if you hit, the attack is redirected to you and a debt-token is placed on the attacker.

title: Thrown Edge
description: Hurl the blade (60-foot range) for 1d8 + EDGE damage; it returns to your hand at the start of your next turn. If the strike drops the target to 0 HP, it returns this turn instead.

title: Long Debt
description: Mark an enemy with a debt they did not agree to. At the start of each of your turns while they live, deal minor IRON damage; the debt follows them even if they flee the scene.

title: Wanderer's Angle
description: You have walked this road before. Move and then make an EDGE strike; if your movement ended behind or flanking the target, the strike returns the card to your hand at end of turn.

title: Old Road
description: A discarded card is never truly gone. Shuffle one Ronin card from your discard back into your deck; if you have no discard, draw a card instead.

title: The Seventh Scar
description: Every scar is a lesson paid in blood. Count your missing health; convert a portion of it into a single devastating EDGE+IRON strike against one enemy. The more wounded you are, the worse the cut.

title: Refusing the Field
description: You decline the battle's terms. Until the start of your next turn, enemies who are not named Marks have disadvantage on attacks against you; your first strike after this ends is a guaranteed critical. Once per short rest.

title: Corrupted Cadence
description: Your broken resonance signature becomes the battle's rhythm. Make three EDGE strikes against up to three different enemies; each hit inflicts a dim flicker on their next action.

title: One True Cut
description: The cut that every empty-handed kata was preparing you for. Declare one enemy; make a single EDGE attack that bypasses armor and resonance-shielding. If the target survives, they cannot attack you until your next turn — they cannot explain what just happened.

title: Form Without Master
description: Adopt the stance that has no lineage. For 3 rounds, each time you avoid an attack (via miss, Refusal Stance, or reaction), you may make a free melee attack against the attacker for 1d8 + EDGE damage (max once per round). Once per long rest.

title: Signed in Blood
description: You draft the terms mid-combat. Choose any two enemies as Marks simultaneously; while both live, your strikes against them cost 1 less AP (minimum 1). When either dies, draw two cards.

title: Ledger Closed
description: The contract ends the way contracts always end — with someone collecting. Make an IRON-weighted attack against your Mark with advantage; if it kills them, every debt-token in play detonates, damaging their bearers.

title: The Blade Comes Home
description: You let the sword leave your hand, and the world brings it back. Make a ranged EDGE attack against every enemy in a line; the card returns to your hand at end of turn regardless of outcome.

title: Debts All Come Due
description: Every long debt, every old road, every wound you left unanswered arrives in the same moment. All enemies you have marked, debted, or wounded this encounter take immediate IRON damage; shuffle your discard back into your deck.

title: Poisoned Bow
description: A bow so low it draws no eye, and a word so soft it draws no blood — yet. Until end of turn, your VEIL checks gain an edge and one enemy's next attack roll against you is made as though through courtly politeness: diminished.

title: Lacquer Step
description: Your sandals make no sound on the waxed floor. Move without provoking reactions; if you end adjacent to an enemy, your next EDGE strike this turn gains advantage.

title: Court Manners
description: Passive. While you have Intelligence on a target, your first attack against them each round does not trigger alarms, witnesses, or opportunity attacks from other creatures, and deals +1d4 damage.

title: Whispered Dossier
description: Every face you have studied leaves a folded note behind your eyes. Gain 1 Intelligence on any enemy you have seen this encounter, without spending an action to gather it.

title: Second Seat
description: You sit below the salt and hear everything. Draw a card; if it is a utility_card, reduce its AP cost by 1 this turn (minimum 0).

title: Net of Eyes
description: Your agents are in every shadow of the room. Mark up to three enemies; you see their intended targets and you gain 1 Intelligence on each at start of your next turn.

title: Sealed Missive
description: A single line on rice paper changes the battle. Choose one enemy: their next action is delayed by one turn as an imaginary order reaches them.

title: Cipher of Whispers
description: The network speaks in code only you can read. Draw two cards; each card drawn this turn converts to 1 Intelligence on a target of your choice instead, if you prefer.

title: The Palace Listens
description: Nothing is said in this room that is not said in yours. For 3 rounds, whenever an enemy plays a control_card or utility_card, you learn it and gain 1 Intelligence on them (max 3 Intelligence gained this way). Once per short rest.

title: Bow, Then Cut
description: The bow is proper. The cut is proper. The target is less sure. EDGE strike that deals additional damage if your last action this turn was not a combat_card.

title: Formal Invitation
description: You name the target, the hour, and the reason. Choose one enemy within 60 feet: for 3 rounds, your attacks against them have advantage and other enemies cannot interpose or aid them — the duel is sanctioned. Once per short rest.

title: Offered Sleeve
description: You present your sleeve in apology; the knife waits inside it. When an enemy attacks you and misses, make an immediate EDGE riposte as a reaction.

title: Fourteen Steps
description: The ritual duel has fourteen steps. You are skipping to the last. EDGE strike; if the target has not yet acted this round, it costs you 1 AP instead of 2.

title: Favor Called
description: Someone owes you. Remove one enemy's minion, ally-of-convenience, or summoned aid from the field until end of round — their master sent them elsewhere at your quiet request.

title: Ledger Mark
description: You open a line of credit against one enemy. Until end of encounter, every attack an ally lands on that target adds 1 Intelligence to your pool.

title: Buyout
description: Everything has a price. Spend 2 Intelligence on a target: their next action becomes yours to direct — choose its target from among their allies.

title: Silk Road
description: Trade flows where you say it flows. Move an ally up to their movement distance, then move one enemy half theirs in any direction — a bribed guard, a rerouted supply line, a word in the right ear.

title: Nothing Said Twice
description: Every whisper you have gathered this encounter exhales at once. Convert all your accumulated Intelligence into a single VEIL+EDGE strike against one enemy; each point of Intelligence sharpens the cut and the cut is heard nowhere.

title: All Debts Called
description: You pull every thread at once and the tapestry falls. Every enemy with a ledger mark, a favor owed, or Intelligence accumulated on them takes VEIL damage and loses their next reaction — the court remembers what they chose to forget.

title: Every Room Is Mine
description: For 3 rounds, all enemies within 60 feet are treated as if you have full Intelligence on them; your strikes ignore cover, concealment, and misdirection, and deal +1d6 damage. Once per long rest.

title: Dead Drop
description: A message you left for yourself years ago arrives on schedule. Search your discard pile for any utility_card or control_card and play it immediately at 0 AP cost; it was always going to be here.

title: Permission to Kill
description: You produce the sealed order; the room steps back. Make an EDGE strike against your Formal Invitation target with guaranteed hit; if they die, no social, political, or narrative consequence accrues to you — it was sanctioned.

title: Three Bows
description: Three bows: to the host, to the opponent, to the blade. Make three EDGE strikes this turn against a single target; each strike between them reduces their resonance by one stage.

title: Hostile Takeover
description: You buy the enemy out from under themselves. Choose one enemy minion or summon with fewer hit dice than you: it becomes yours for the remainder of the encounter, its original master unable to countermand you.

title: Margin Call
description: Every favor, every bribe, every little kindness you have ever spent returns in a single wave. All ledger-marked and Intelligence-marked enemies lose 1 AP this round (maximum 3 enemies); draw 1 card. Once per long rest.

title: Armor Pry
description: Hook a plate and wrench. Melee attack for 1d6 + IRON; on hit, the target is Exposed (+1d6 to the next attack against them) until the start of your next turn.

title: Hairline Fracture
description: Tap the weakest rivet. A fault spreads through the target's guard, promising a louder break later.

title: Scavenger's Sense
description: Passive. You read damaged plating like a map. Gain a bonus on FRAME checks to spot weak points, hidden caches, and salvageable wreckage.

title: Dancer's Pivot
description: Reaction. When struck, spend the momentum to slip sideways. Halve the hit and end adjacent to a different foe.

title: Scrap Caltrops
description: Scatter broken shell fragments at your feet. The square becomes hazardous to anyone who wants to close with you.

title: Broken Weave
description: Slip between failures in the target's stance. Move up to 15 feet through one enemy's square without triggering opportunity attacks; your next melee attack against that enemy this turn has advantage.

title: Second Skin
description: Level-up. You've learned to wear scavenged plates like they were grown on. Gain a small permanent bonus to IRON saves while any armor you're wearing is damaged.

title: Rhythm of the Break
description: Level-up. Your Cascade no longer drains fully between fights; retain one point at the start of each combat.

title: Oathsplitter
description: Target a foe currently protecting another. Melee strike for 2d6 + IRON; ignores cover, shields, and any damage reduction granted by allies.

title: Fracture Echo
description: When an enemy's armor breaks, the sound travels. Nearby foes with similar gear lose a small amount of IRON until end of round.

title: Promise to Break
description: Mark a target within 30 feet. Your next strike against them this round ignores armor and AC bonuses (auto-hits AC 10 + DEX); spend 1 Cascade.

title: Recursive Strike
description: Reaction: when you apply Exposed or crack armor on a foe, immediately make one free melee attack against them for 1d8 + IRON damage. Once per round.

title: Bruise Bank
description: Passive. Damage you absorb this turn becomes Cascade on the next. You pay yourself back in fractures.

title: Last Breath Dance
description: Reaction. When a hit would drop you, enter Shell Step for free and remain at 1 HP until the end of the next enemy turn.

title: Scar Tissue
description: Each scar is a lesson the body remembers. Gain a stacking IRON bonus for each wound you've already taken this combat.

title: Unbroken Stance
description: Root yourself. Until the start of your next turn, you cannot be moved or knocked prone, and incoming damage is reduced by 1d6 + FRAME.

title: Shell Harvest
description: Passive. When a foe's armor breaks (Exposed applied), pocket a shard (max 3 stored); spend 1 shard before a strike to add +1d6 damage and ignore resistance.

title: Junk Ward
description: Lash scrap to your arm. Gain 1d8 + FRAME temporary HP that absorbs one hit; when depleted, it bursts and deals 1d6 piercing to the attacker.

title: Discard Pile
description: Study what others threw away. Once per encounter, name one item or weapon type; you treat a nearby piece of broken gear as that object for one turn.

title: Rivet Toss
description: Hurl a fistful of scavenged rivets in a 15-foot cone. Each enemy takes 1d4 + EDGE piercing (DEX save half) and takes -1 AC until the start of your next turn.

title: Shatter Cascade
description: Spend 2 Cascade to crack every armored foe within 10 feet. Each takes 2d6 + IRON damage and is Exposed (+1d6 to next attack) until the start of your next turn. Once per short rest.

title: Hollow Armory
description: You've carried so many broken shells they start to carry you. For one round, each Cascade point grants a temporary plate of scavenged armor, stacking.

title: Worldcrack
description: Name an oath or bond on the battlefield. Each creature tied to it within 60 feet takes 3d6 + IRON resonant damage (WIS save half); if the bond is broken, gain 1 Cascade per creature harmed (max 3). Once per long rest.

title: Final Vow
description: Swear aloud to end one target this round. Your attacks against them this turn ignore AC, cover, and resistance and deal +2d6 damage on hit. If they survive, you cannot play Breaker cards next round. Once per short rest.

title: Walking Wound
description: For three rounds, you cannot fall below 1 HP. When the effect ends, all stored damage lands at once on the nearest enemy instead of you.

title: Bedrock
description: You become the thing that does not move. Until your next turn, all allies adjacent to you share your IRON save, and attacks that would knock them down strike you instead.

title: Salvagewright
description: Reach into the wreckage of the battle so far. Reclaim one used card of AP 2 or less from your discard pile and play it immediately at reduced cost.

title: Ghost Plating
description: Weave every shell shard you've collected this combat into a suit. Gain temporary armor equal to the number of foes you've cracked; lasts until shattered.

title: Void Step
description: Step between the pages of what is and what was. Short RESONANCE-guided teleport; you briefly cease to be witnessed, breaking line of effect on enemies you pass.

title: Read the Margin
description: Every sutra has an unwritten edge. Make a VEIL check on one enemy; you learn one truth about them — a weakness, a fear, or what they refuse to say — and your next action against them hits as if it were already sentenced.

title: Marginalia
description: You have begun writing in the sacred spaces. Once per encounter, rewrite one die you just rolled on a RESONANCE or VEIL check; the correction becomes canon.

title: Consecrated Breath
description: Inhale the stillness between prayers. Clear one minor status on yourself and gain 1d6 + RESONANCE temporary HP; you may not speak (cannot use cards with a spoken effect) until your next turn. Once per short rest.

title: Mark of Apostasy
description: Point, name the sin, and the void remembers. Apply the Apostate mark to one enemy for the encounter; your strikes against Apostates deal extra VEIL damage and ignore resonance cover.

title: Question Under Void
description: Drag one enemy into the thin place where lies cannot hold. Target makes a VEIL save; on failure, they reveal one card in hand or one tactic — you gain a counter to it.

title: Confession Brand
description: The guilty confess whether they mean to or not. RESONANCE strike against an Apostate; if it hits, the target loses 1 AP on their next turn as the brand burns.

title: Heretic's Leash
description: The void pulls the faithless home. Drag one Apostate adjacent to you; they cannot move further from you than short range until end of your next turn.

title: Open the Stacks
description: Unshelve a ruling no one has read in a century. Draw two cards; if either is a subclass card, reduce its AP cost by 1 the first time you play it this encounter.

title: Forbidden Citation
description: Cite a sutra the Priors forbade. VEIL attack that uses an enemy's own resonance against them; the damage scales with their resonance score, not yours.

title: Footnote of Unbeing
description: Append a correction to the world. Choose one recent event this round (a hit, a miss, a movement); you may re-read it as if it happened slightly differently. Once per encounter.

title: Index the Foe
description: Every enemy has a filing. Spend a short action to index one enemy; you and allies gain advantage on the next check made against them, and you may recall that index later to cast it again as a free card.

title: The First Tongue
description: Speak in the voice that named the void. One enemy must pass a RESONANCE save or stand transfixed until the start of your next turn; allies who hear you gain courage and shed one fear condition.

title: Borrowed Authority
description: You are not speaking — the First is speaking through you. Your next card played this turn is treated as if cast by a Prior: ignore resistance, and treat failed saves against it as critical.

title: Ancestral Rebuke
description: The long-dead rebuke the living. Reaction: when an enemy hits an ally, speak the rebuke; the attacker takes RESONANCE damage and has disadvantage on their next attack.

title: Witness of the First
description: Call the first sutensai to watch this moment. For the rest of your turn, every card you play also inflicts a minor VEIL tremor on its target; at turn's end, you take 1 HP as the Witness withdraws.

title: Sutra of Unwriting
description: Recite the sutra that undoes what has been recorded. Choose one enemy buff, summoned creature, or terrain-inscription in play; it ceases to have been. The target may contest with a RESONANCE save.

title: Vein of Silence
description: Open a seam of the void and let the hush pour through. All enemies in a 15-foot radius are Silenced (cannot use spoken or resonance-powered abilities) until the start of your next turn; allies in the zone gain 1d6 + RESONANCE temporary HP. Once per long rest.

title: Tribunal of One
description: You are court, jury, and void-blessed blade. Make three RESONANCE strikes in sequence against one Apostate; between strikes, the target must answer (RESONANCE save) or shed one AP per failed answer.

title: Void-Blessed Verdict
description: Pronounce verdict in the old tongue. One Apostate you can see must pass a RESONANCE+VEIL save; on failure, they are removed from the field until start of your next turn, standing in a place that is not quite here.

title: The Unsealed Folio
description: You crack the seal the Priors swore you would not. Draw four cards; any of them marked forbidden may be played this encounter ignoring their normal restrictions. At end of encounter, one random card is lost from your deck forever.

title: Librarian's Erasure
description: Some names should not be in the record. Choose one enemy within 60 feet; for 3 rounds, they have disadvantage on attacks against you, and allies treat them as unseen until the first time they deal damage. Once per long rest.

title: Throat of the First
description: The First sutensai speaks with your mouth. Until your next turn, your Priors Voice cards cost 1 less AP (minimum 1) and inflict VEIL fear on the first target each round. You cannot speak in any other tongue.

title: Procession of the Ascendants
description: Summon the echo of every Prior who ever held this office. Each ally gains a +1 to their next RESONANCE or VEIL roll this encounter; each enemy in sight must pass a RESONANCE save or kneel, losing their next action.

title: Absence Step
description: Unspool from the space you occupied and condense somewhere the battle was not watching. Move up to your speed; you cannot be targeted by reactions triggered by that movement.

title: Nothing Answers
description: A target calls on a blessing, buff, or resonance link and finds only you listening. Strip one active positive effect from an enemy within sight; they cannot reapply it this round.

title: Silence the Name
description: Strike with a hand that leaves no signature. Deal VEIL + RESONANCE damage; the target loses track of you — they cannot target you with single-target attacks until they are struck by an ally or act twice.

title: Zero Point
description: Passive: where you stand, readings fail. Enemies adjacent to you lose any bonus gained from flanking, marking, or target-tracking effects; scrying and remote-sensing cannot locate you.

title: Autonomic Parry
description: Reaction: the Shell answers before the mind notices the blade. When hit, reduce the incoming damage by FRAME + VEIL and redirect a fraction to the attacker if they are within reach.

title: Unmanned Strike
description: The body keeps its routines even when you do not. Deal 1d8 + FRAME damage; this card may be played while you are Stunned, Dazed, or otherwise unable to act. Once per round.

title: Clockwork Advance
description: A single looped routine: step, pivot, strike. Move up to your speed and make one Basic Attack dealing 1d6 + FRAME damage; the movement does not provoke opportunity attacks.

title: Operator Absent
description: Passive: there is no mind at the helm to bend. You are immune to Fear, Charm, Confusion, and any effect that targets intent or will; effects that require you to ""choose"" resolve as if you had chosen nothing.

title: The Empty Gate
description: Open a door onto nothing in the shape of an incoming harm. Negate one attack, spell, or effect targeting you or an ally within 15 feet; the source suffers Expose 4 as the nothing looks back.

title: Where You Were
description: Leave a void-shadow where your body stood and step out of the scene entirely. Until your next turn you do not exist on the battlefield; enemies resolve their actions against the shadow, then you reappear in any space within 25 feet and deal VEIL + RESONANCE damage to one adjacent enemy.

title: Run Without Pilot
description: Hand the controls to the body and watch. The Shell takes two full autonomous actions on your next turn at no AP cost, chosen by you now; while running, you cannot be mind-read, interrogated, or compelled.

title: The Shell Remains
description: When your HP would drop to 0, the Shell does not notice. Remain standing with 1 HP for one full round; during that round you cannot be reduced below 1 HP and your attacks deal FRAME + RESONANCE bonus damage. At the end of the round, fall.

title: The First Naming
description: The moment a player first speaks an intention aloud in combat, something answers back. Once per turn, when you play a blank (unnamed) card, reduce its AP cost by 1 (minimum 0) and give it a provisional name until the end of the encounter.

title: Shared Outline
description: You are not one thing yet. As a bonus action, choose an ally within FRAME x 5 feet; until the start of your next turn, each of you may use the other's RESONANCE modifier in place of your own for one check or save.

title: Single Axis
description: Pick one enemy and let every other thought fall away. Until the start of your next turn, you have advantage on attacks and checks made against that creature, and disadvantage on everything else. The first hit against them adds your RESONANCE modifier as bonus damage.

title: Gathered Edge
description: Draw every unnamed possibility into the strike. Make a melee attack; for each blank card still in your hand, this attack gains +1 to hit and deals bonus damage equal to your FRAME modifier on a hit.

title: Point of Certainty
description: Name yourself for a moment. Until the end of your turn, you cannot be surprised, charmed, or forced to move, and your next attack deals +1d6 damage and ignores resistance.

title: One Becomes All
description: Choose a single named card in your hand; until the start of your next turn, every other card you play this turn counts as a copy of that card for its triggers, conditions, and synergies — but each still costs its printed AP.

title: Split Intent
description: Speak two names in one breath. Make a melee or ranged attack against up to two different creatures within reach or range; each attack is made with a -2 penalty but on hit, each target takes half damage from the other attack as resonance echo.

title: Scattered Pattern
description: Fan the unnamed out like cards on a table. Choose up to three creatures within FRAME x 5 feet of you; each must succeed a RESONANCE save or suffer a different random minor condition (flat-footed, shaken, dazzled, or distracted) until the start of your next turn.

title: Which One Am I
description: Refuse to be singular. Until the start of your next turn, the first attack against you automatically misses (attacker hits an illusory silhouette); you gain 1 extra reaction this round. Once per short rest.

title: Many Hands
description: Let the pattern do the work. Choose two allies within 30 feet; each may use their reaction to move up to half their speed or make one weapon attack (1d6 + stat), and you may do the same.

title: The Inventory
description: You open your hand and count what you have become. Draw cards until you have the number of named cards equal to your RESONANCE modifier (minimum 2); each blank card drawn this way may be provisionally named now, for this encounter only.

title: Pattern Lock
description: Trace a closed shape around the battle in one motion. Until the end of your next turn, every creature in a 30-foot radius (including allies) that moves more than half their speed in a turn takes damage equal to your FRAME modifier; you are immune to this effect.

title: Echo of Selves
description: Summon two phantom outlines of the self you haven't chosen yet. They stand in spaces within FRAME x 5 feet of you and persist until the start of your next turn; each enemy must guess which is you on its first attack, and on a wrong guess the attack is wasted on the echo.

title: The Only Name
description: For one turn, be the singular thing you have been moving toward. Choose one enemy within 60 feet; until the start of your next turn, you cannot target other creatures, but attacks against the chosen target score critical hits on any roll of 15+ on the d20. Once per long rest.

title: Collapse Inward
description: Pull every unresolved possibility into a single point in your palm. Discard all blank cards from your hand; make one attack that deals bonus damage equal to the number discarded times your RESONANCE modifier and ignores all cover and concealment.

title: Fan the Deck
description: Lay every possible self out at once. Until the start of your next turn, you occupy up to three spaces within FRAME x 5 feet of your starting space simultaneously; enemies must choose one space to target, and you resolve attacks and damage from any of them.

title: Nobody in Particular
description: Refuse every name offered to you this round. Until the start of your next turn, all ongoing effects, conditions, and tracked resources targeting you are suspended and cannot be re-applied; you cannot be healed or buffed by allies either. Once per long rest.

title: The Sixteenth Card
description: At the end of all your naming, one card remains unwritten — and that is the point. Once per long rest, play any named card in your hand as if it were every category at once: it triggers every condition, synergy, and reaction it could qualify for, resolving each in the order you choose, and is then removed from your deck forever.

title: Silent Cadence
description: Your footfalls stop returning to sensors; movement this turn leaves no digital or resonant trace, and your next melee strike this turn deals +1d6 damage.

title: Veilstep
description: Slip between packets. Reposition once without breaking a Veil state you currently hold.

title: Walk the Line
description: Move into an enemy-occupied space as if you belong there; the squad's threat register skips you until you act.

title: Wear Their Face
description: Borrow a target's biometric handshake. For up to 3 rounds, you register as an ally to their faction's sensors and enemies of that faction will not attack you first — ends when you deal damage. Concentration.

title: Inside Blade
description: Strike from an enemy's formation for 2d6 + EDGE damage; on hit, the wound reads as friendly fire — one ally of the target attacks them as a reaction at your EDGE roll.

title: No One Here
description: When the alarm sounds, you were already gone. Negate the first Detect or Reveal effect made against you each round.

title: Deadline
description: Sever a target's uplink. Until your next turn they cannot call for reinforcements or receive buffs from allies.

title: Static Cage
description: Flood a zone with masking noise; enemies inside cannot coordinate actions with allies outside the zone.

title: Last Word
description: Intercept an enemy's final transmission. Cancel one reaction or called response they attempt this turn.

title: Frayed Line
description: Passive/free: the target's augment feedback turns on them. One enemy within 30 feet makes their next attack roll at disadvantage. Once per turn.

title: Borrowed Intent
description: Pluck a fragment of your target's plan. Learn their next declared action; they cannot change it without spending AP.

title: Replay the Strike
description: Cast a stolen memory back. Repeat the last attack an enemy made this round against that enemy, using your EDGE for the attack roll. Damage is equal to the original attack's damage (max 2d10 + EDGE).

title: Cold Reading
description: Skim the target's recent memory. Reveal one hidden stat, cooldown, or intent and mark it as known to your allies.

title: Redacted Self
description: Erase yourself from a target's recollection. They cannot target you on their next turn unless an ally reminds them.

title: Blackroom
description: Drop a pocket of total sensor silence over the field. For one round, no one inside sees outside; no one outside sees in.

title: Seventh Cut
description: Strike a target seven times in the seams of their armor. Deal 1d6 + EDGE damage per previous Veilblade card played this encounter (min 2d6, max 7d6). Once per long rest.

title: Null Accord
description: Declare yourself unseen for the rest of the round; actions taken cannot be reacted to, but any witness left alive marks you forever.

title: The Quiet Hour
description: For one round you do not exist on the battlefield's records; you act normally but no opponent may designate you as a target.

title: Empty Uniform
description: Leave a perfect double behind; the enemy squad treats it as you for a round while you act from anywhere in their formation.

title: Dead Channel
description: Cut every wire in a wide zone. For one round no augment, summon, or remote asset in the area can receive input.

title: Severance
description: Choose a single enemy; their augmentations, network buffs, and allied links cut out for the rest of the encounter.

title: Steal the Commander
description: Pull a memory of command from the enemy leader; issue one of their orders back to their squad against them.

title: Archive of Knives
description: Replay every attack you have witnessed this encounter as a single sequenced strike against one target: deal 1d8 per attack witnessed (min 3d8, max 8d8) + EDGE damage. Once per long rest.

title: Nameless Edict
description: Capstone: declare a target's name stricken. For 3 rounds, that target has -5 AC and cannot be healed or supported by allies; your next strike this turn deals 6d8 + EDGE damage and auto-crits on hit. Once per long rest.

title: Witness Step
description: You step where the oath is thinnest. Move up to your speed; if you end adjacent to a target carrying Debt, apply Debt 1 and they cannot disengage from you until end of turn.

title: Ledger's Shield
description: The weight they owe becomes the weight you carry. Until start of your next turn, damage you take is reduced by the total Debt stacks on enemies within 30 feet (max 6 total reduction).

title: Called to Account
description: Reaction: when an enemy within 40 feet attacks an ally, name the debt. The attacker must redirect to you or take 4 + RESONANCE damage and gain Debt 2.

title: The Watching Ledger
description: Passive. At the start of each of your turns, one enemy within 40 feet that has acted against your contract since your last turn gains Debt 1. You always know the Debt count on every enemy you can see.

title: Interest Accrues
description: Rider. Choose one enemy carrying Debt. At the end of each round until cleared or detonated, they gain Debt 1. Stacks no higher than three instances of this rider.

title: First Mark
description: You learn to write the debt in their skin before they know they owe. The first card you play each turn that applies Debt applies 1 additional stack.

title: Reading the Weight
description: Study one enemy within 40 feet. You learn their highest-value obligation (a person, oath, or possession they would act to protect). Until end of encounter, they gain Debt 1 each time they act contrary to that obligation.

title: Binding Word
description: Speak the code aloud. One target within 30 feet is Bound: while Bound, if they attack anyone other than you, they immediately gain Debt 2 and you may make a free reaction strike. Bound ends when you apply Debt via any other card.

title: The Code Remembers
description: Passive-rider. The first time each encounter an enemy breaks an oath, flees a pact, or betrays an ally in your sight, they gain Debt 4 and are marked Oathbroken until you detonate them.

title: Ledger of Witnesses
description: Every ally within 30 feet of you becomes a witness. For the rest of the encounter, each time a witnessed enemy strikes a witness and misses, that enemy gains Debt 1.

title: Stand the Line
description: Plant yourself. Until start of your next turn, any enemy who crosses within 15 feet of you gains Debt 1 on entering, and you may spend your reaction to strike them with VEIL + RESONANCE.

title: Name the Debtor
description: Single out one enemy you can see; they become your Debtor until they die, surrender, or the encounter ends. You always know their exact location while on the same plane, and your cards that apply Debt apply 1 additional stack against them.

title: Pursuit Cadence
description: You move in their rhythm. Move up to twice your speed in a straight line toward your Debtor; if you end within 5 feet, make a free VEIL strike that cannot be interrupted.

title: Extraction Hold
description: Grab your Debtor by what they cannot afford to lose. They are Held: they cannot move, teleport, or phase-shift until they clear all Debt or take 10 damage. While Held, their allies cannot target you with spells.

title: Paid in Kind
description: When your Debtor dies, you collect. Recover 1 AP, draw 2 cards, and clear one condition on yourself. If the killing blow was a detonation, also gain temporary HP equal to your RESONANCE score.

title: Shatter Oath
description: Break a promise you never made. One enemy with 2+ Debt loses all class-granted buffs and passives until end of their next turn; you deal damage equal to the number of effects stripped times your VEIL.

title: Fracture Line
description: Draw a line of ruin between two enemies within 40 feet of each other. Both gain Debt 2; whenever one of them takes damage for the rest of the encounter, the other takes half as spillover.

title: Broken Word
description: You unmake a bond. Target one enemy who has granted a buff, link, or pact to another this encounter; the bond snaps. Dealer and receiver both gain Debt 3 and cannot be healed by each other for the rest of the encounter.

title: Gift of Ruin
description: Hand a Debt to someone who had none. An enemy without Debt gains Debt 3, and the next time they are struck by any ally, the striker adds your VEIL to the damage. Flavor: the fracture travels the handshake.

title: Collection Day
description: You call every debt due at once. Every enemy within 40 feet carrying Debt pays: each loses 1 Debt stack and takes 1d6 + VEIL damage per stack lost. Once per long rest.

title: Final Witness
description: You pronounce judgment. Every enemy within 40 feet that has broken an oath, betrayed an ally, or fled a pact this encounter is immediately detonated: they suffer damage equal to 8 + VEIL plus 4 per Debt stack. Debt cleared.

title: The Unbreakable Contract
description: Write a contract in the air between you and one target. For the next three rounds: every action they take that violates their own stated code applies Debt 2 and triggers a free First Detonation effect from you. If they do not break the code in three rounds, you lose 5 HP and the contract dissolves.

title: No Escape Clause
description: Your Debtor cannot leave. For the next three rounds, they cannot teleport, phase, flee, die (reduced only to 1 HP), or pass out of your sight. Each round, they gain Debt 2 at the start of their turn. When the three rounds end, detonate them fully.

title: Harvest
description: Move up to your speed, striking every Debtor or Debt-carrier you pass within 5 feet with 6 + VEIL damage. Each enemy struck loses half their Debt stacks as damage; you recover 1 AP if any target dies. Flavor: the collector walks the row and every marked one drops.

title: Cascade Fracture
description: Choose one enemy with 4+ Debt and detonate them; the fracture cascades. The detonation damage echoes at half value to every enemy within 30 feet of the primary, and each echo-hit enemy gains Debt 3. Second-order Debt-carriers may be caught in a chain at a quarter value.

title: The Unmade Vow
description: You rip a vow out of the world entirely. Pick any oath, pact, bond, summon, or active magical contract on the battlefield; it is severed. Every creature party to the severed bond gains Debt 5 and takes 10 + VEIL damage. The memory of the vow is also lost from the world.

title: Unmoored
description: The walker's outline blurs; for one round allies cannot be cleanly targeted through her.

title: Thin Place
description: Mark a spot where the world wears through; any Void Walker card played from that tile costs 1 less AP this turn.

title: Silent Corridor
description: Open a shrieking seam between two points on the field; allies passing through it spend no movement and emerge unseen.

title: Collapse the Distance
description: Fold every threshold into a single breath; teleport to any space you can see within 60 feet and make one melee attack for 3d6 + EDGE damage with advantage. Once per short rest.

title: Hollowing Wave
description: A silent pulse of un-place; enemies in a line are briefly severed from their own bodies and lose their next reaction.

title: Seam Walker
description: Treat any wall, door, or barrier under one tile thick as if it were open. Until end of turn, your movement ignores closed obstacles.

title: Breathless
description: Hold the void in your lungs; you cannot be detected, scanned, or tracked for up to 3 rounds or until you attack or speak. Concentration.

title: Thread the Needle
description: Slip through a gap no wider than a hair; move up to 15 feet through one enemy's space without triggering reactions, and gain advantage on your next attack this turn.

title: Keyhole
description: Scout a sliver of elsewhere; peek through any solid surface within sight and reveal what waits on the other side.

title: Drag Under
description: Reach into a target's shadow and pull them halfway through; the enemy is briefly displaced into the in-between and loses their next move.

title: Hooked Silence
description: Sink a void-hook into an enemy; on their next turn, you yank them one tile toward you at no cost.

title: Doorway Grave
description: Mark a tile as a false door; the first enemy to cross it stumbles into the in-between and is stunned when they return.

title: Undertow
description: Every enemy adjacent to you is dragged one tile toward the nearest wall, edge, or hazard as the floor thins beneath them.

title: Tether
description: Bind a thread of RESONANCE to an ally; while it holds they cannot be displaced, banished, or phased against their will.

title: Lighthouse
description: Plant yourself as a fixed point; allies within 30 feet who took resonant or void damage this round heal 1d6 + RESONANCE at the start of their next turn.

title: Call Them Home
description: Reach after an ally who has been phased, banished, or pulled into the in-between and return them to the tile beside you.

title: Steady Seam
description: Sew the air shut around an ally for one round; they are immune to teleport, pull, and forced movement effects.

title: The Seventh Door
description: Open a door that was never there; step from your tile to anywhere you have ever been this combat, and take one free action on arrival.

title: Unwitnessed
description: For 2 rounds, enemies have disadvantage on attacks against you and cannot target you with abilities that require a known target. Once per long rest.

title: The Long Swallow
description: Grab an enemy and drag them bodily into the in-between; they vanish from the field for one full round and return prone beside you.

title: Every Door Opens Inward
description: For the rest of the round, every enemy that moves ends their movement one tile closer to you instead of where they intended.

title: The Kept Name
description: Speak an ally's true name; until the end of combat they cannot be reduced below one HP by void, phase, or banishment effects.

title: Stitched World
description: Seal every seam in the area for one round; no one, friend or foe, may teleport, phase, or be pulled while the stitches hold.

title: Counterweave
description: Reaction: when a signal or enhancement ability targets you, re-route the incoming thread back into its source's feed.

title: Faraday Shroud
description: Wrap yourself in a dampening lattice; hostile signal pings slide off you until your next turn.

title: Packet Sniff
description: Skim the ambient wire-chatter around a target; reveal one augmentation, tag, or hidden status they carry.

title: Ghost in the Cable
description: Passive: while you stand adjacent to Wire Craft infrastructure, enemies take a penalty to locate or target you.

title: Thread the Needle
description: Slip along a stretched wire-filament between two points you can see; ignores difficult terrain and small obstructions.

title: Static Feedback
description: Reaction: when an ally within 30 feet is hit, deal 1d6 + SIGNAL lightning damage to the attacker as feedback.

title: Second Harmonic
description: Level-Up: you now hum on two frequencies; once per round, a SIGNAL check may be retried at a different harmonic.

title: Stitched Aura
description: Level-Up: passive weave extends one pace around you; allies inside the weave gain a small VEIL benefit.

title: Bladeline
description: Draw a humming wire-line between two points; any hostile crossing it this round is slashed by taut signal.

title: Snare Lattice
description: Fling a crosshatch of iron thread onto a tile; the first enemy to enter is rooted as the lattice cinches tight.

title: Parry Filament
description: Reaction: a filament snaps taut across an incoming melee arc, shearing part of the blow before it lands.

title: Tightening Ring
description: Weave an iron ring around a target; each turn the target remains, the ring cinches closer and applies increasing pressure.

title: Sell a Shadow
description: Trade a second of your VEIL to an ally; they gain concealment for their next action, you are briefly more visible.

title: Lien on the Wire
description: Place a lien on a target's signal feed; you may call in the debt later for a free SIGNAL check against them.

title: Market Price
description: Quote the going rate to an enemy: they pay AP to act normally next turn, or suffer a penalty.

title: Contract Clause
description: Bind an ally and an enemy within 30 feet; for 2 rounds, half the damage either takes is dealt to the other. WIS save (by enemy) negates.

title: Dead Channel
description: Open a whisper-thin line to the resonant dead in the area; gain a single piece of insight the living cannot provide.

title: Borrow a Grudge
description: Pull a dead soldier's grudge through the wire; your next strike against a marked foe this turn deals +2d6 resonant damage and ignores resistance.

title: Chorus of Rust
description: Let the dead speak in chorus through your weave; enemies in range hear the names of their own dead and are shaken.

title: Seance Knot
description: Tie a knot of mourning-wire over a fallen body; for a short time, the dead can act once more through the weave.

title: Anchor Post
description: Set a wire anchor at your current position; your future weaves originate from or pass through this anchor.

title: Warp Field
description: Weave a broad warp across a zone; allies inside move faster along its grain, enemies move slower against it.

title: Loomwall
description: Raise a tall wall of interlaced wire between two anchors; blocks line of sight and bleeds signal that touches it.

title: Zone Pattern
description: Commit a named pattern into the zone (bless, curse, or mark); anyone stepping on it triggers its effect once.

title: Signal Crown
description: Power: wear the wire as a crown; for the next rounds, every SIGNAL check you make pulls a minor secondary effect along with it.

title: Unbroken Thread
description: Power: name one ally; until the thread breaks, you and they share a channel — you can pass an action, a veil, or a wound between you.

title: Killing Lattice
description: Subclass Power: designate a 20-foot cube within 60 feet for 3 rounds. Hostile creatures entering take 2d8 + SIGNAL slashing and have their speed halved. Once per long rest.

title: Iron Aegis
description: Subclass Power: draw every filament into a shining aegis around an ally within 60 feet; the next 2 incoming attacks against them auto-miss. Once per long rest.

title: Hostile Takeover
description: Subclass Power: call in every outstanding lien at once; all marked enemies suffer feedback and lose their next action as the debts are collected.

title: Open the Market
description: Subclass Power: declare an auction on the battlefield; allies may spend AP to buy each other's cards or effects for one round.

title: Iron Pallbearers
description: Subclass Power: summon a cohort of wire-sheathed dead who carry an ally across the battlefield, shielding them along the route.

title: The Long Dial Tone
description: Subclass Power: hold open a channel with the dead across an entire fight; once per round, ask one question and the dead answer truthfully.

title: Cathedral Loom
description: Subclass Power: raise a vaulted loom over the battlefield; the zone gains a single rule of your choosing while the loom stands.

title: Fold the Zone
description: Subclass Power: fold two anchors together; for a moment, the space between them collapses and any unit may step from one to the other.
